authors_text: Itai Gat,Guy Lorberbom,Idan Schwartz,Tamir Hazan
title: Latent Space Explanation by Intervention
title_zh: 通过干预解释潜在空间
abstract: The success of deep neural nets heavily relies on their ability to encode complex relations between their input and their output. While this property serves to fit the training data well, it also obscures the mechanism that drives prediction. This study aims to reveal hidden concepts by employing an intervention mechanism that shifts the predicted class based on discrete variational autoencoders. An explanatory model then visualizes the encoded information from any hidden layer and its corresponding intervened representation. By the assessment of differences between the original representation and the intervened representation, one can determine the concepts that can alter the class, hence providing interpretability. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on CelebA, where we show various visualizations for bias in the data and suggest different interventions to reveal and change bias.
summary: The success of deep neural nets heavily relies on their ability to encode complex relations between their input and their output. While this property serves to fit the training data well, it also obscures the mechanism that drives prediction. This study aims to reveal hidden concepts by employing an intervention mechanism that shifts the predicted class based on discrete variational autoencoders. An explanatory model then visualizes the encoded information from any hidden layer and its corresponding intervened representation. By the assessment of differences between the original representation and the intervened representation, one can determine the concepts that can alter the class, hence providing interpretability. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on CelebA, where we show various visualizations for bias in the data and suggest different interventions to reveal and change bias.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络的成功在很大程度上依赖于它们对输入和输出之间的复杂关系进行编码的能力。虽然这个属性可以很好地拟合训练数据，但它也掩盖了驱动预测的机制。本研究旨在通过采用一种基于离散变分自动编码器改变预测类别的干预机制来揭示隐藏的概念。然后，解释模型将来自任何隐藏层的编码信息及其相应的干预表示可视化。通过评估原始表示和干预表示之间的差异，我们可以确定可以改变类的概念，从而提供可解释性。我们在 CelebA 上展示了我们方法的有效性，我们在 CelebA 上展示了数据偏差的各种可视化，并建议不同的干预措施来揭示和改变偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过干预潜在空间来解释深度神经网络隐藏概念的方法，利用离散变分自编码器揭示影响预测的关键概念。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络虽能有效编码输入输出关系，但其内部机制难以解释，导致预测过程缺乏可解释性，需通过干预揭示隐藏概念以提升模型透明度。
AI.method: 采用离散变分自编码器构建干预机制，通过修改潜在表示中的特定概念来改变预测结果，并通过对比原始与干预后的表示差异进行可视化分析。
AI.result: 在CelebA数据集上验证了方法有效性，展示了数据偏见的可视化结果，并提出针对不同偏见的干预策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过干预潜在空间成功揭示了影响模型预测的关键概念，为深度学习模型的可解释性提供了有效工具。

authors_text: Xiangde Luo,Minhao Hu,Tao Song,Guotai Wang,Shaoting Zhang
title: Semi-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation via Cross Teaching between CNN and Transformer
title_zh: 通过 CNN 和 Transformer 交叉教学进行半监督医学图像分割
abstract: Recently, deep learning with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Transformers has shown encouraging results in fully supervised medical image segmentation. However, it is still challenging for them to achieve good performance with limited annotations for training. In this work, we present a very simple yet efficient framework for semi-supervised medical image segmentation by introducing the cross teaching between CNN and Transformer. Specifically, we simplify the classical deep co-training from consistency regularization to cross teaching, where the prediction of a network is used as the pseudo label to supervise the other network directly end-to-end. Considering the difference in learning paradigm between CNN and Transformer, we introduce the Cross Teaching between CNN and Transformer rather than just using CNNs. Experiments on a public benchmark show that our method outperforms eight existing semi-supervised learning methods just with a simpler framework. Notably, this work may be the first attempt to combine CNN and transformer for semi-supervised medical image segmentation and achieve promising results on a public benchmark. The code will be released at: https://github.com/HiLab-git/SSL4MIS.
summary: Recently, deep learning with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Transformers has shown encouraging results in fully supervised medical image segmentation. However, it is still challenging for them to achieve good performance with limited annotations for training. In this work, we present a very simple yet efficient framework for semi-supervised medical image segmentation by introducing the cross teaching between CNN and Transformer. Specifically, we simplify the classical deep co-training from consistency regularization to cross teaching, where the prediction of a network is used as the pseudo label to supervise the other network directly end-to-end. Considering the difference in learning paradigm between CNN and Transformer, we introduce the Cross Teaching between CNN and Transformer rather than just using CNNs. Experiments on a public benchmark show that our method outperforms eight existing semi-supervised learning methods just with a simpler framework. Notably, this work may be the first attempt to combine CNN and transformer for semi-supervised medical image segmentation and achieve promising results on a public benchmark. The code will be released at: https://github.com/HiLab-git/SSL4MIS.
abstract_zh: 最近，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和 Transformer 的深度学习在完全监督的医学图像分割方面显示出了令人鼓舞的结果。然而，他们在训练注释有限的情况下取得良好的性能仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们通过引入 CNN 和 Transformer 之间的交叉教学，提出了一个非常简单而有效的半监督医学图像分割框架。具体来说，我们将经典的深度协同训练从一致性正则化简化为交叉教学，其中网络的预测用作伪标签来直接端到端地监督另一个网络。考虑到 CNN 和 Transformer 之间学习范式的差异，我们引入 CNN 和 Transformer 之间的交叉教学，而不仅仅是使用 CNN。公共基准测试表明，我们的方法仅使用更简单的框架就优于八种现有的半监督学习方法。值得注意的是，这项工作可能是首次尝试将 CNN 和 Transformer 结合起来进行半监督医学图像分割，并在公共基准上取得了有希望的结果。代码将发布在：https://github.com/HiLab-git/SSL4MIS。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于CNN与Transformer交叉教学的半监督医学图像分割框架
AI.motivation: 解决医学图像分割中标注数据不足导致的模型性能下降问题
AI.method: 通过交叉教学机制，利用CNN和Transformer相互生成伪标签进行端到端训练，简化共训练流程
AI.result: 在公共基准测试中优于八种现有方法，首次结合CNN与Transformer实现半监督医学图像分割
AI.conclusion: 交叉教学框架有效提升半监督分割性能，代码已开源

authors_text: Qingfeng Yao,Jilong Wang,Shuyu Yang
title: Real-World Dexterous Object Manipulation based Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于深度强化学习的现实世界灵巧物体操作
comment: Best Paper Award Runner Up winner submission for Real Robot Challenge 2021
comments: Best Paper Award Runner Up winner submission for Real Robot Challenge 2021
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning has shown its advantages in real-time decision-making based on the state of the agent. In this stage, we solved the task of using a real robot to manipulate the cube to a given trajectory. The task is broken down into different procedures and we propose a hierarchical structure, the high-level deep reinforcement learning model selects appropriate contact positions and the low-level control module performs the position control under the corresponding trajectory. Our framework reduces the disadvantage of low sample efficiency of deep reinforcement learning and lacking adaptability of traditional robot control methods. Our algorithm is trained in simulation and migrated to reality without fine-tuning. The experimental results show the effectiveness of our method both simulation and reality. Our code and video can be found at https://github.com/42jaylonw/RRC2021ThreeWolves and https://youtu.be/Jr176xsn9wg.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning has shown its advantages in real-time decision-making based on the state of the agent. In this stage, we solved the task of using a real robot to manipulate the cube to a given trajectory. The task is broken down into different procedures and we propose a hierarchical structure, the high-level deep reinforcement learning model selects appropriate contact positions and the low-level control module performs the position control under the corresponding trajectory. Our framework reduces the disadvantage of low sample efficiency of deep reinforcement learning and lacking adaptability of traditional robot control methods. Our algorithm is trained in simulation and migrated to reality without fine-tuning. The experimental results show the effectiveness of our method both simulation and reality. Our code and video can be found at https://github.com/42jaylonw/RRC2021ThreeWolves and https://youtu.be/Jr176xsn9wg.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习在基于智能体状态的实时决策方面展现了其优势。在这个阶段，我们解决了使用真实机器人将立方体操纵到给定轨迹的任务。该任务被分解为不同的过程，我们提出了一个层次结构，高层深度强化学习模型选择合适的接触位置，低层控制模块在相应的轨迹下执行位置控制。我们的框架减少了深度强化学习样本效率低和传统机器人控制方法缺乏适应性的缺点。我们的算法经过模拟训练，无需微调即可迁移到现实。实验结果表明了我们的方法在模拟和现实中的有效性。我们的代码和视频可以在 https://github.com/42jaylonw/RRC2021ThreeWolves 和 https://youtu.be/Jr176xsn9wg 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度强化学习的分层框架，实现真实机器人对立方体的轨迹操控。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人控制方法缺乏适应性，深度强化学习样本效率低，需解决仿真到现实的迁移问题。
AI.method: 采用分层结构，高层RL模型选择接触点，底层模块执行轨迹控制，通过仿真训练直接迁移至现实环境。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在仿真与现实中的有效性，无需微调即可完成立方体轨迹操控任务。
AI.conclusion: 该框架结合RL适应性与传统控制效率，证明了仿真训练直接迁移至真实场景的可行性。

Our framework reduces the disadvantage of low sample efficiency of deep reinforcement learning and lacking adaptability of traditional robot control methods. Our algorithm is trained in simulation and migrated to reality without fine-tuning. The experimental results show the effectiveness of our method both simulation and reality. Our code and video can be found at https://github.com/42jaylonw/RRC2021ThreeWolves and https://youtu.be/Jr176xsn9wg. 深度强化学习在基于智能体状态的实时决策方面展现了其优势。在这个阶段，我们解决了使用真实机器人将立方体操纵到给定轨迹的任务。该任务被分解为不同的过程，我们提出了一个层次结构，高层深度强化学习模型选择合适的接触位置，低层控制模块在相应的轨迹下执行位置控制。我们的框架减少了深度强化学习样本效率低和传统机器人控制方法缺乏适应性的缺点。我们的算法经过模拟训练，无需微调即可迁移到现实。实验结果表明了我们的方法在模拟和现实中的有效性。我们的代码和视频可以在 https://github.com/42jaylonw/RRC2021ThreeWolves 和 https://youtu.be/Jr176xsn9wg 找到。 本文提出基于深度强化学习的分层框架，实现真实机器人对立方体的轨迹操控。 Qingfeng Yao,Jilong Wang,Shuyu Yang cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Andrea Ponti
title: Multi-Task Learning on Networks
title_zh: 网络上的多任务学习
abstract: The multi-task learning (MTL) paradigm can be traced back to an early paper of Caruana (1997) in which it was argued that data from multiple tasks can be used with the aim to obtain a better performance over learning each task independently. A solution of MTL with conflicting objectives requires modelling the trade-off among them which is generally beyond what a straight linear combination can achieve. A theoretically principled and computationally effective strategy is finding solutions which are not dominated by others as it is addressed in the Pareto analysis. Multi-objective optimization problems arising in the multi-task learning context have specific features and require adhoc methods. The analysis of these features and the proposal of a new computational approach represent the focus of this work. Multi-objective evolutionary algorithms (MOEAs) can easily include the concept of dominance and therefore the Pareto analysis. The major drawback of MOEAs is a low sample efficiency with respect to function evaluations. The key reason for this drawback is that most of the evolutionary approaches do not use models for approximating the objective function. Bayesian Optimization takes a radically different approach based on a surrogate model, such as a Gaussian Process. In this thesis the solutions in the Input Space are represented as probability distributions encapsulating the knowledge contained in the function evaluations. In this space of probability distributions, endowed with the metric given by the Wasserstein distance, a new algorithm MOEA/WST can be designed in which the model is not directly on the objective function but in an intermediate Information Space where the objects from the input space are mapped into histograms. Computational results show that the sample efficiency and the quality of the Pareto set provided by MOEA/WST are significantly better than in the standard MOEA.

abstract_zh: 多任务学习（MTL）范式可以追溯到 Caruana（1997）的一篇早期论文，其中认为可以使用来自多个任务的数据来获得比独立学习每个任务更好的性能。具有冲突目标的 MTL 解决方案需要对它们之间的权衡进行建模，这通常超出了直线组合所能实现的范围。一种理论上有原则且计算上有效的策略是寻找不受其他人主导的解决方案，正如帕累托分析中所解决的那样。多任务学习环境中出现的多目标优化问题具有特定的特征，需要特殊的方法。对这些特征的分析和新计算方法的提出是这项工作的重点。多目标进化算法 (MOEA) 可以轻松包含优势概念，从而包含帕累托分析。 MOEA 的主要缺点是功能评估方面的样本效率较低。这个缺点的关键原因是大多数进化方法不使用模型来逼近目标函数。贝叶斯优化采用基于代理模型的完全不同的方法，例如高斯过程。在本文中，输入空间中的解被表示为封装函数评估中包含的知识的概率分布。在这个概率分布空间中，赋予 Wasserstein 距离给出的度量，可以设计一种新算法 MOEA/WST，其中模型不是直接在目标函数上，而是在中间信息空间中，其中来自输入空间的对象被映射到直方图。计算结果表明，MOEA/WST提供的Pareto集的样本效率和质量明显优于标准MOEA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Wasserstein距离的多目标进化算法（MOEA/WST），通过概率分布建模改进多任务学习中的样本效率和帕累托前沿质量。
AI.motivation: 传统多任务学习在处理冲突目标时效率低下，且多目标进化算法（MOEA）因缺乏目标函数建模导致样本效率不足，需探索更优方法。
AI.method: 将输入空间映射到直方图构成的信息空间，利用Wasserstein距离度量概率分布间的差异，设计MOEA/WST算法实现非支配解优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，MOEA/WST在样本效率和帕累托前沿质量上显著优于传统MOEA。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合贝叶斯优化思想与进化算法，MOEA/WST为多任务学习提供了更高效的多目标优化解决方案。

authors_text: Jan Priesmann,Justin Münch,Elias Ridha,Thomas Spiegel,Marius Reich,Mario Adam,Lars Nolting,Aaron Praktiknjo
title: Artificial Intelligence and Design of Experiments for Assessing Security of Electricity Supply: A Review and Strategic Outlook
title_zh: 人工智能与电力供应安全评估实验设计：回顾与战略展望
abstract: Assessing the effects of the energy transition and liberalization of energy markets on resource adequacy is an increasingly important and demanding task. The rising complexity in energy systems requires adequate methods for energy system modeling leading to increased computational requirements. Furthermore, with complexity, uncertainty increases likewise calling for probabilistic assessments and scenario analyses. To adequately and efficiently address these various requirements, new methods from the field of data science are needed to accelerate current methods. With our systematic literature review, we want to close the gap between the three disciplines (1) assessment of security of electricity supply, (2) artificial intelligence, and (3) design of experiments. For this, we conduct a large-scale quantitative review on selected fields of application and methods and make a synthesis that relates the different disciplines to each other. Among other findings, we identify metamodeling of complex security of electricity supply models using AI methods and applications of AI-based methods for forecasts of storage dispatch and (non-)availabilities as promising fields of application that have not sufficiently been covered, yet. We end with deriving a new methodological pipeline for adequately and efficiently addressing the present and upcoming challenges in the assessment of security of electricity supply.
summary: Assessing the effects of the energy transition and liberalization of energy markets on resource adequacy is an increasingly important and demanding task. The rising complexity in energy systems requires adequate methods for energy system modeling leading to increased computational requirements. Furthermore, with complexity, uncertainty increases likewise calling for probabilistic assessments and scenario analyses. To adequately and efficiently address these various requirements, new methods from the field of data science are needed to accelerate current methods. With our systematic literature review, we want to close the gap between the three disciplines (1) assessment of security of electricity supply, (2) artificial intelligence, and (3) design of experiments. For this, we conduct a large-scale quantitative review on selected fields of application and methods and make a synthesis that relates the different disciplines to each other. Among other findings, we identify metamodeling of complex security of electricity supply models using AI methods and applications of AI-based methods for forecasts of storage dispatch and (non-)availabilities as promising fields of application that have not sufficiently been covered, yet. We end with deriving a new methodological pipeline for adequately and efficiently addressing the present and upcoming challenges in the assessment of security of electricity supply.
abstract_zh: 评估能源转型和能源市场自由化对资源充足性的影响是一项日益重要和艰巨的任务。能源系统日益复杂，需要适当的能源系统建模方法，从而导致计算需求增加。此外，随着复杂性的增加，不确定性也同样需要概率评估和情景分析。为了充分有效地满足这些不同的要求，需要数据科学领域的新方法来加速当前的方法。通过系统的文献回顾，我们希望缩小三个学科之间的差距：（1）电力供应安全评估，（2）人工智能，（3）实验设计。为此，我们对选定的应用领域和方法进行了大规模的定量审查，并进行了将不同学科相互联系起来的综合。除其他发现外，我们还确定了使用人工智能方法对复杂的电力供应模型安全进行元建模，以及基于人工智能的方法在预测存储调度和（非）可用性方面的应用，这是尚未充分覆盖的有前景的应用领域。最后，我们得出了一个新的方法论渠道，以充分有效地解决电力供应安全评估中当前和即将到来的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过系统综述弥合电力供应安全评估、人工智能与实验设计三个领域的差距，并提出应对未来挑战的新方法论框架。
AI.motivation: 能源转型与市场自由化导致电力系统复杂性增加，传统方法难以满足计算需求与不确定性分析要求，亟需数据科学新方法提升评估效率。
AI.method: 开展大规模定量文献综述，选取关键应用领域与方法进行跨学科关联分析，合成不同学科间的联系并提出新方法论流程。
AI.result: 识别出基于AI的电力供应安全模型元建模、储能调度与可用性预测等应用潜力未被充分开发，并构建了整合AI与实验设计的新方法论框架。
AI.conclusion: 人工智能与实验设计的融合可有效提升电力供应安全评估能力，提出的跨学科方法论为应对当前及未来挑战提供了可行路径。

authors_text: Weijia Wu,Yuanqiang Cai,Debing Zhang,Sibo Wang,Zhuang Li,Jiahong Li,Yejun Tang,Hong Zhou
title: A Bilingual, OpenWorld Video Text Dataset and End-to-end Video Text Spotter with Transformer
title_zh: 双语 OpenWorld 视频文本数据集和带有 Transformer 的端到端视频文本识别器
abstract: Most existing video text spotting benchmarks focus on evaluating a single language and scenario with limited data. In this work, we introduce a large-scale, Bilingual, Open World Video text benchmark dataset(BOVText). There are four features for BOVText. Firstly, we provide 2,000+ videos with more than 1,750,000+ frames, 25 times larger than the existing largest dataset with incidental text in videos. Secondly, our dataset covers 30+ open categories with a wide selection of various scenarios, e.g., Life Vlog, Driving, Movie, etc. Thirdly, abundant text types annotation (i.e., title, caption or scene text) are provided for the different representational meanings in video. Fourthly, the BOVText provides bilingual text annotation to promote multiple cultures live and communication. Besides, we propose an end-to-end video text spotting framework with Transformer, termed TransVTSpotter, which solves the multi-orient text spotting in video with a simple, but efficient attention-based query-key mechanism. It applies object features from the previous frame as a tracking query for the current frame and introduces a rotation angle prediction to fit the multiorient text instance. On ICDAR2015(video), TransVTSpotter achieves the state-of-the-art performance with 44.1% MOTA, 9 fps. The dataset and code of TransVTSpotter can be found at github:com=weijiawu=BOVText and github:com=weijiawu=TransVTSpotter, respectively.
summary: Most existing video text spotting benchmarks focus on evaluating a single language and scenario with limited data. In this work, we introduce a large-scale, Bilingual, Open World Video text benchmark dataset(BOVText). There are four features for BOVText. Firstly, we provide 2,000+ videos with more than 1,750,000+ frames, 25 times larger than the existing largest dataset with incidental text in videos. Secondly, our dataset covers 30+ open categories with a wide selection of various scenarios, e.g., Life Vlog, Driving, Movie, etc. Thirdly, abundant text types annotation (i.e., title, caption or scene text) are provided for the different representational meanings in video. Fourthly, the BOVText provides bilingual text annotation to promote multiple cultures live and communication. Besides, we propose an end-to-end video text spotting framework with Transformer, termed TransVTSpotter, which solves the multi-orient text spotting in video with a simple, but efficient attention-based query-key mechanism. It applies object features from the previous frame as a tracking query for the current frame and introduces a rotation angle prediction to fit the multiorient text instance. On ICDAR2015(video), TransVTSpotter achieves the state-of-the-art performance with 44.1% MOTA, 9 fps. The dataset and code of TransVTSpotter can be found at github:com=weijiawu=BOVText and github:com=weijiawu=TransVTSpotter, respectively.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的视频文本识别基准侧重于使用有限的数据评估单一语言和场景。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个大规模、双语、开放世界视频文本基准数据集（BOVText）。 BOVText 有四个功能。首先，我们提供了 2,000 多个视频，超过 1,750,000 帧，比现有最大的视频附带文本数据集大 25 倍。其次，我们的数据集涵盖了 30 多个开放类别，具有多种场景选择，例如生活 Vlog、驾驶、电影等。第三，为视频中的不同表示含义提供了丰富的文本类型注释（即标题、说明文字或场景文本）。第四，BOVText提供双语文本注释，促进多种文化的生存和交流。此外，我们提出了一种使用 Transformer 的端到端视频文本识别框架，称为 TransVTSpotter，它通过简单但有效的基于注意力的查询键机制解决了视频中的多方向文本识别问题。它将前一帧的对象特征用作当前帧的跟踪查询，并引入旋转角度预测以适应多方向文本实例。在 ICDAR2015（视频）上，TransVTSpotter 以 44.1% MOTA、9 fps 实现了最先进的性能。 TransVTSpotter 的数据集和代码可以分别在 github:com=weijiawu=BOVText 和 github:com=weijiawu=TransVTSpotter 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个双语、开放世界视频文本数据集BOVText及基于Transformer的端到端视频文本检测框架TransVTSpotter。
AI.motivation: 现有视频文本检测基准数据集存在单语言、单场景、数据量小等问题，难以满足多语言、多场景的实际需求。
AI.method: 构建包含2000+视频、175万+帧的BOVText数据集，覆盖30+开放类别及双语标注；设计TransVTSpotter框架，采用基于注意力机制的查询-键机制和旋转角度预测实现多方向文本检测。
AI.result: 在ICDAR2015(video)数据集上达到44.1% MOTA指标，处理速度9fps，代码和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: BOVText为视频文本检测提供了大规模双语数据支持，TransVTSpotter通过高效Transformer架构提升了多方向文本检测性能。

authors_text: Céline Budding,Fabian Eitel,Kerstin Ritter,Stefan Haufe
title: Evaluating saliency methods on artificial data with different background types
title_zh: 评估不同背景类型的人工数据的显着性方法
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures. Presented at Medical Imaging meets NeurIPS 2021 (poster presentation)
comments: 6 pages, 2 figures. Presented at Medical Imaging meets NeurIPS 2021 (poster presentation)
abstract: Over the last years, many 'explainable artificial intelligence' (xAI) approaches have been developed, but these have not always been objectively evaluated. To evaluate the quality of heatmaps generated by various saliency methods, we developed a framework to generate artificial data with synthetic lesions and a known ground truth map. Using this framework, we evaluated two data sets with different backgrounds, Perlin noise and 2D brain MRI slices, and found that the heatmaps vary strongly between saliency methods and backgrounds. We strongly encourage further evaluation of saliency maps and xAI methods using this framework before applying these in clinical or other safety-critical settings.
summary: Over the last years, many 'explainable artificial intelligence' (xAI) approaches have been developed, but these have not always been objectively evaluated. To evaluate the quality of heatmaps generated by various saliency methods, we developed a framework to generate artificial data with synthetic lesions and a known ground truth map. Using this framework, we evaluated two data sets with different backgrounds, Perlin noise and 2D brain MRI slices, and found that the heatmaps vary strongly between saliency methods and backgrounds. We strongly encourage further evaluation of saliency maps and xAI methods using this framework before applying these in clinical or other safety-critical settings.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，许多“可解释的人工智能”（xAI）方法已经被开发出来，但这些方法并不总是得到客观的评估。为了评估各种显着性方法生成的热图的质量，我们开发了一个框架来生成具有合成病变和已知地面实况图的人工数据。使用这个框架，我们评估了两个具有不同背景的数据集、Perlin 噪声和 2D 脑 MRI 切片，发现热图在显着性方法和背景之间存在很大差异。我们强烈鼓励使用该框架进一步评估显着图和 xAI 方法，然后再将其应用于临床或其他安全关键环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个框架，用于在不同背景类型的人工数据上评估显著性方法生成的热图质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的可解释人工智能（xAI）方法缺乏客观评估，需验证其在临床等关键场景中的可靠性。
AI.method: 开发合成数据生成框架，包含人工病变和已知真实地图，并测试两种背景（Perlin噪声和2D脑MRI切片）。
AI.result: 不同显著性方法和背景导致热图结果差异显著，表明方法性能受数据背景影响较大。
AI.conclusion: 建议在临床等安全关键场景应用前，使用该框架进一步验证显著性地图和xAI方法的有效性。

authors_text: Zhiping Luo,Wentao Xu,Weiqing Liu,Jiang Bian,Jian Yin,Tie-Yan Liu
title: KGE-CL: Contrastive Learning of Tensor Decomposition Based Knowledge Graph Embeddings
title_zh: KGE-CL：基于张量分解的知识图嵌入的对比学习
abstract: Learning the embeddings of knowledge graphs (KG) is vital in artificial intelligence, and can benefit various downstream applications, such as recommendation and question answering. In recent years, many research efforts have been proposed for knowledge graph embedding (KGE). However, most previous KGE methods ignore the semantic similarity between the related entities and entity-relation couples in different triples since they separately optimize each triple with the scoring function. To address this problem, we propose a simple yet efficient contrastive learning framework for tensor decomposition based (TDB) KGE, which can shorten the semantic distance of the related entities and entity-relation couples in different triples and thus improve the performance of KGE. We evaluate our proposed method on three standard KGE datasets: WN18RR, FB15k-237 and YAGO3-10. Our method can yield some new state-of-the-art results, achieving 51.2% MRR, 46.8% Hits@1 on the WN18RR dataset, 37.8% MRR, 28.6% Hits@1 on FB15k-237 dataset, and 59.1% MRR, 51.8% Hits@1 on the YAGO3-10 dataset.
summary: Learning the embeddings of knowledge graphs (KG) is vital in artificial intelligence, and can benefit various downstream applications, such as recommendation and question answering. In recent years, many research efforts have been proposed for knowledge graph embedding (KGE). However, most previous KGE methods ignore the semantic similarity between the related entities and entity-relation couples in different triples since they separately optimize each triple with the scoring function. To address this problem, we propose a simple yet efficient contrastive learning framework for tensor decomposition based (TDB) KGE, which can shorten the semantic distance of the related entities and entity-relation couples in different triples and thus improve the performance of KGE. We evaluate our proposed method on three standard KGE datasets: WN18RR, FB15k-237 and YAGO3-10. Our method can yield some new state-of-the-art results, achieving 51.2% MRR, 46.8% Hits@1 on the WN18RR dataset, 37.8% MRR, 28.6% Hits@1 on FB15k-237 dataset, and 59.1% MRR, 51.8% Hits@1 on the YAGO3-10 dataset.
abstract_zh: 学习知识图（KG）的嵌入在人工智能中至关重要，并且可以使各种下游应用受益，例如推荐和问答。近年来，人们提出了许多关于知识图嵌入（KGE）的研究工作。然而，大多数先前的 KGE 方法忽略了不同三元组中相关实体和实体关系对之间的语义相似性，因为它们使用评分函数分别优化每个三元组。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的基于张量分解（TDB）KGE的对比学习框架，它可以缩短不同三元组中相关实体和实体关系对的语义距离，从而提高KGE的性能。我们在三个标准 KGE 数据集上评估我们提出的方法：WN18RR、FB15k-237 和 YAGO3-10。我们的方法可以产生一些新的最先进的结果，在 WN18RR 数据集上实现 51.2% MRR、46.8% Hits@1，在 FB15k-237 数据集上实现 37.8% MRR、28.6% Hits@1，在 YAGO3-10 数据集上实现 59.1% MRR、51.8% Hits@1。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于张量分解的知识图谱嵌入对比学习框架KGE-CL，旨在通过缩短相关实体和实体-关系对的语义距离来提升知识图谱嵌入性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法在优化三元组时独立处理每个三元组，忽略了不同三元组中相关实体及实体-关系对的语义相似性，导致语义距离未能有效缩短。
AI.method: 设计了一种简单高效的对比学习框架，结合张量分解方法，通过对比学习机制强化相关实体和实体-关系对在语义空间中的关联性。
AI.result: 在WN18RR、FB15k-237和YAGO3-10三个标准数据集上取得新SOTA结果，例如在WN18RR数据集上分别达到51.2% MRR和46.8% Hits@1。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习框架有效捕捉了知识图谱中实体与关系的语义关联，显著提升了嵌入质量，在多个基准数据集上验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: KGE-CL: Contrastive Learning of Tensor Decomposition Based Knowledge Graph Embeddings KGE-CL：基于张量分解的知识图嵌入的对比学习 Learning the embeddings of knowledge graphs (KG) is vital in artificial intelligence, and can benefit various downstream applications, such as recommendation and question answering. In recent years, many research efforts have been proposed for knowledge graph embedding (KGE). However, most previous KGE methods ignore the semantic similarity between the related entities and entity-relation couples in different triples since they separately optimize each triple with the scoring function. To address this problem, we propose a simple yet efficient contrastive learning framework for tensor decomposition based (TDB) KGE, which can shorten the semantic distance of the related entities and entity-relation couples in different triples and thus improve the performance of KGE. We evaluate our proposed method on three standard KGE datasets: WN18RR, FB15k-237 and YAGO3-10. Our method can yield some new state-of-the-art results, achieving 51.2% MRR, 46.8% Hits@1 on the WN18RR dataset, 37.8% MRR, 28.6% Hits@1 on FB15k-237 dataset, and 59.1% MRR, 51.8% Hits@1 on the YAGO3-10 dataset. 学习知识图（KG）的嵌入在人工智能中至关重要，并且可以使各种下游应用受益，例如推荐和问答。近年来，人们提出了许多关于知识图嵌入（KGE）的研究工作。然而，大多数先前的 KGE 方法忽略了不同三元组中相关实体和实体关系对之间的语义相似性，因为它们使用评分函数分别优化每个三元组。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的基于张量分解（TDB）KGE的对比学习框架，它可以缩短不同三元组中相关实体和实体关系对的语义距离，从而提高KGE的性能。我们在三个标准 KGE 数据集上评估我们提出的方法：WN18RR、FB15k-237 和 YAGO3-10。我们的方法可以产生一些新的最先进的结果，在 WN18RR 数据集上实现 51.2% MRR、46.8% Hits@1，在 FB15k-237 数据集上实现 37.8% MRR、28.6% Hits@1，在 YAGO3-10 数据集上实现 59.1% MRR、51.8% Hits@1。 本文提出一种基于张量分解的知识图谱嵌入对比学习框架KGE-CL，旨在通过缩短相关实体和实体-关系对的语义距离来提升知识图谱嵌入性能。 Zhiping Luo,Wentao Xu,Weiqing Liu,Jiang Bian,Jian Yin,Tie-Yan Liu cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Jianhui Yu,Chaoyi Zhang,Heng Wang,Dingxin Zhang,Yang Song,Tiange Xiang,Dongnan Liu,Weidong Cai
title: 3D Medical Point Transformer: Introducing Convolution to Attention Networks for Medical Point Cloud Analysis
title_zh: 3D Medical Point Transformer：将卷积引入注意力网络以进行医疗点云分析
abstract: General point clouds have been increasingly investigated for different tasks, and recently Transformer-based networks are proposed for point cloud analysis. However, there are barely related works for medical point clouds, which are important for disease detection and treatment. In this work, we propose an attention-based model specifically for medical point clouds, namely 3D medical point Transformer (3DMedPT), to examine the complex biological structures. By augmenting contextual information and summarizing local responses at query, our attention module can capture both local context and global content feature interactions. However, the insufficient training samples of medical data may lead to poor feature learning, so we apply position embeddings to learn accurate local geometry and Multi-Graph Reasoning (MGR) to examine global knowledge propagation over channel graphs to enrich feature representations. Experiments conducted on IntrA dataset proves the superiority of 3DMedPT, where we achieve the best classification and segmentation results. Furthermore, the promising generalization ability of our method is validated on general 3D point cloud benchmarks: ModelNet40 and ShapeNetPart. Code is released.
summary: General point clouds have been increasingly investigated for different tasks, and recently Transformer-based networks are proposed for point cloud analysis. However, there are barely related works for medical point clouds, which are important for disease detection and treatment. In this work, we propose an attention-based model specifically for medical point clouds, namely 3D medical point Transformer (3DMedPT), to examine the complex biological structures. By augmenting contextual information and summarizing local responses at query, our attention module can capture both local context and global content feature interactions. However, the insufficient training samples of medical data may lead to poor feature learning, so we apply position embeddings to learn accurate local geometry and Multi-Graph Reasoning (MGR) to examine global knowledge propagation over channel graphs to enrich feature representations. Experiments conducted on IntrA dataset proves the superiority of 3DMedPT, where we achieve the best classification and segmentation results. Furthermore, the promising generalization ability of our method is validated on general 3D point cloud benchmarks: ModelNet40 and ShapeNetPart. Code is released.
abstract_zh: 人们越来越多地研究通用点云用于不同的任务，最近提出了基于 Transformer 的网络用于点云分析。然而，对于疾病检测和治疗很重要的医学点云却鲜有相关工作。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种专门针对医疗点云的基于注意力的模型，即 3D 医疗点 Transformer (3DMedPT)，以检查复杂的生物结构。通过增强上下文信息并总结查询时的本地响应，我们的注意力模块可以捕获本地上下文和全局内容特征交互。然而，医学数据的训练样本不足可能会导致特征学习效果不佳，因此我们应用位置嵌入来学习准确的局部几何形状，并应用多图推理（MGR）来检查通道图上的全局知识传播，以丰富特征表示。在IntrA数据集上进行的实验证明了3DMedPT的优越性，我们取得了最好的分类和分割结果。此外，我们方法的良好泛化能力在通用 3D 点云基准测试：ModelNet40 和 ShapeNetPart 上得到了验证。代码已发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种专为医学点云分析设计的3D医疗点Transformer（3DMedPT），用于疾病检测和治疗中的复杂生物结构分析。
AI.motivation: 医学点云数据样本不足导致特征学习困难，而现有方法缺乏针对医学点云的专门模型，需提升分类与分割性能。
AI.method: 结合注意力机制增强上下文信息与局部响应，引入位置嵌入学习局部几何结构，并采用多图推理（MGR）模块丰富全局特征表示。
AI.result: 在IntrA数据集上取得最优分类与分割结果，并在ModelNet40和ShapeNetPart通用基准中验证了方法的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 3DMedPT有效解决了医学点云分析的样本不足问题，其方法在医学与通用点云任务中均表现出色，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Axel Barroso-Laguna,Yurun Tian,Krystian Mikolajczyk
title: ScaleNet: A Shallow Architecture for Scale Estimation
title_zh: ScaleNet：用于规模估计的浅层架构
comment: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2022
abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of estimating scale factors between images. We formulate the scale estimation problem as a prediction of a probability distribution over scale factors. We design a new architecture, ScaleNet, that exploits dilated convolutions as well as self and cross-correlation layers to predict the scale between images. We demonstrate that rectifying images with estimated scales leads to significant performance improvements for various tasks and methods. Specifically, we show how ScaleNet can be combined with sparse local features and dense correspondence networks to improve camera pose estimation, 3D reconstruction, or dense geometric matching in different benchmarks and datasets. We provide an extensive evaluation on several tasks and analyze the computational overhead of ScaleNet. The code, evaluation protocols, and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/axelBarroso/ScaleNet.
summary: In this paper, we address the problem of estimating scale factors between images. We formulate the scale estimation problem as a prediction of a probability distribution over scale factors. We design a new architecture, ScaleNet, that exploits dilated convolutions as well as self and cross-correlation layers to predict the scale between images. We demonstrate that rectifying images with estimated scales leads to significant performance improvements for various tasks and methods. Specifically, we show how ScaleNet can be combined with sparse local features and dense correspondence networks to improve camera pose estimation, 3D reconstruction, or dense geometric matching in different benchmarks and datasets. We provide an extensive evaluation on several tasks and analyze the computational overhead of ScaleNet. The code, evaluation protocols, and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/axelBarroso/ScaleNet.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了估计图像之间的比例因子的问题。我们将尺度估计问题表述为对尺度因子的概率分布的预测。我们设计了一种新的架构 ScaleNet，它利用扩张卷积以及自相关层和互相关层来预测图像之间的比例。我们证明，使用估计比例校正图像可以显着提高各种任务和方法的性能。具体来说，我们展示了 ScaleNet 如何与稀疏局部特征和密集对应网络相结合，以改进不同基准和数据集中的相机姿态估计、3D 重建或密集几何匹配。我们对多项任务进行了广泛的评估，并分析了 ScaleNet 的计算开销。代码、评估协议和训练模型可在 https://github.com/axelBarroso/ScaleNet 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ScaleNet的浅层架构，用于估计图像间的缩放因子，以提升图像校正和相关视觉任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 准确的缩放估计对于图像校正及后续视觉任务（如相机姿态估计、3D重建等）至关重要，但现有方法在效率和精度上存在不足，需提出更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计了一种浅层神经网络架构ScaleNet，结合扩张卷积、自相关层和交叉相关层，直接预测图像间的缩放因子分布。
AI.result: 在多个视觉任务（如相机姿态估计、3D重建）和基准数据集上验证了ScaleNet的有效性，校正后的图像显著提升任务性能，同时保持较低的计算开销。
AI.conclusion: ScaleNet在缩放估计任务中表现出色，有效提升相关视觉任务的性能，且具有较低的计算成本，为后续研究提供了可复现的工具和基准。

result: 在多个视觉任务（如相机姿态估计、3D重建）和基准数据集上验证了ScaleNet的有效性，校正后的图像显著提升任务性能，同时保持较低的计算开销。
conclusion: ScaleNet在缩放估计任务中表现出色，有效提升相关视觉任务的性能，且具有较低的计算成本，为后续研究提供了可复现的工具和基准。
search_text: ScaleNet: A Shallow Architecture for Scale Estimation ScaleNet：用于规模估计的浅层架构 In this paper, we address the problem of estimating scale factors between images. We formulate the scale estimation problem as a prediction of a probability distribution over scale factors. We design a new architecture, ScaleNet, that exploits dilated convolutions as well as self and cross-correlation layers to predict the scale between images. We demonstrate that rectifying images with estimated scales leads to significant performance improvements for various tasks and methods. Specifically, we show how ScaleNet can be combined with sparse local features and dense correspondence networks to improve camera pose estimation, 3D reconstruction, or dense geometric matching in different benchmarks and datasets. We provide an extensive evaluation on several tasks and analyze the computational overhead of ScaleNet. The code, evaluation protocols, and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/axelBarroso/ScaleNet. 在本文中，我们解决了估计图像之间的比例因子的问题。我们将尺度估计问题表述为对尺度因子的概率分布的预测。我们设计了一种新的架构 ScaleNet，它利用扩张卷积以及自相关层和互相关层来预测图像之间的比例。我们证明，使用估计比例校正图像可以显着提高各种任务和方法的性能。具体来说，我们展示了 ScaleNet 如何与稀疏局部特征和密集对应网络相结合，以改进不同基准和数据集中的相机姿态估计、3D 重建或密集几何匹配。我们对多项任务进行了广泛的评估，并分析了 ScaleNet 的计算开销。代码、评估协议和训练模型可在 https://github.com/axelBarroso/ScaleNet 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种名为ScaleNet的浅层架构，用于估计图像间的缩放因子，以提升图像校正和相关视觉任务的性能。 Axel Barroso-Laguna,Yurun Tian,Krystian Mikolajczyk cs.CV

authors_text: Wenxuan Tu,Sihang Zhou,Yue Liu,Xinwang Liu
title: Siamese Attribute-missing Graph Auto-encoder
title_zh: 连体属性缺失图自动编码器
abstract: Graph representation learning (GRL) on attribute-missing graphs, which is a common yet challenging problem, has recently attracted considerable attention. We observe that existing literature: 1) isolates the learning of attribute and structure embedding thus fails to take full advantages of the two types of information; 2) imposes too strict distribution assumption on the latent space variables, leading to less discriminative feature representations. In this paper, based on the idea of introducing intimate information interaction between the two information sources, we propose our Siamese Attribute-missing Graph Auto-encoder (SAGA). Specifically, three strategies have been conducted. First, we entangle the attribute embedding and structure embedding by introducing a siamese network structure to share the parameters learned by both processes, which allows the network training to benefit from more abundant and diverse information. Second, we introduce a K-nearest neighbor (KNN) and structural constraint enhanced learning mechanism to improve the quality of latent features of the missing attributes by filtering unreliable connections. Third, we manually mask the connections on multiple adjacent matrices and force the structural information embedding sub-network to recover the true adjacent matrix, thus enforcing the resulting network to be able to selectively exploit more high-order discriminative features for data completion. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our SAGA against the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Graph representation learning (GRL) on attribute-missing graphs, which is a common yet challenging problem, has recently attracted considerable attention. We observe that existing literature: 1) isolates the learning of attribute and structure embedding thus fails to take full advantages of the two types of information; 2) imposes too strict distribution assumption on the latent space variables, leading to less discriminative feature representations. In this paper, based on the idea of introducing intimate information interaction between the two information sources, we propose our Siamese Attribute-missing Graph Auto-encoder (SAGA). Specifically, three strategies have been conducted. First, we entangle the attribute embedding and structure embedding by introducing a siamese network structure to share the parameters learned by both processes, which allows the network training to benefit from more abundant and diverse information. Second, we introduce a K-nearest neighbor (KNN) and structural constraint enhanced learning mechanism to improve the quality of latent features of the missing attributes by filtering unreliable connections. Third, we manually mask the connections on multiple adjacent matrices and force the structural information embedding sub-network to recover the true adjacent matrix, thus enforcing the resulting network to be able to selectively exploit more high-order discriminative features for data completion. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of our SAGA against the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 属性缺失图上的图表示学习（GRL）是一个常见但具有挑战性的问题，最近引起了相当多的关注。我们观察到现有文献：1）孤立了属性和结构嵌入的学习，因此未能充分利用这两类信息； 2）对潜在空间变量施加过于严格的分布假设，导致特征表示的辨别力较差。在本文中，基于在两个信息源之间引入密切信息交互的思想，我们提出了连体属性缺失图自动编码器（SAGA）。具体来说，实施了三项策略。首先，我们通过引入孪生网络结构来将属性嵌入和结构嵌入结合在一起，以共享两个过程学习到的参数，这使得网络训练能够受益于更丰富和多样化的信息。其次，我们引入了 K 最近邻（KNN）和结构约束增强学习机制，通过过滤不可靠的连接来提高缺失属性的潜在特征的质量。第三，我们手动屏蔽多个相邻矩阵上的连接，并强制结构信息嵌入子网络恢复真实的相邻矩阵，从而强制生成的网络能够选择性地利用更多高阶判别特征来完成数据。对六个基准数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的 SAGA 相对于最先进的方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SAGA的暹罗属性缺失图自编码器，用于解决属性缺失图的图表示学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法分别处理属性嵌入和结构嵌入，未能充分利用两者信息，且对潜在空间分布假设过严导致特征区分度不足。
AI.method: 提出SAGA方法，包含三个策略：1) 通过暹罗网络共享参数实现属性与结构嵌入的耦合；2) 引入KNN和结构约束机制过滤不可靠连接；3) 掩码邻接矩阵并强制结构子网络恢复真实矩阵以提取高阶特征。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上的实验表明，SAGA优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SAGA通过信息交互机制和结构约束有效提升了属性缺失图的表示学习效果。

authors_text: Nagashree K. S. Rao,Nils Peters
title: On The Effect Of Coding Artifacts On Acoustic Scene Classification
title_zh: 编码伪影对声学场景分类的影响
comment: paper presented at the 2021 Workshop on Detection and Classification of Acoustic Scenes and Events (DCASE)
comments: paper presented at the 2021 Workshop on Detection and Classification of Acoustic Scenes and Events (DCASE)
abstract: Previous DCASE challenges contributed to an increase in the performance of acoustic scene classification systems. State-of-the-art classifiers demand significant processing capabilities and memory which is challenging for resource-constrained mobile or IoT edge devices. Thus, it is more likely to deploy these models on more powerful hardware and classify audio recordings previously uploaded (or streamed) from low-power edge devices. In such scenario, the edge device may apply perceptual audio coding to reduce the transmission data rate. This paper explores the effect of perceptual audio coding on the classification performance using a DCASE 2020 challenge contribution [1]. We found that classification accuracy can degrade by up to 57% compared to classifying original (uncompressed) audio. We further demonstrate how lossy audio compression techniques during model training can improve classification accuracy of compressed audio signals even for audio codecs and codec bitrates not included in the training process.
summary: Previous DCASE challenges contributed to an increase in the performance of acoustic scene classification systems. State-of-the-art classifiers demand significant processing capabilities and memory which is challenging for resource-constrained mobile or IoT edge devices. Thus, it is more likely to deploy these models on more powerful hardware and classify audio recordings previously uploaded (or streamed) from low-power edge devices. In such scenario, the edge device may apply perceptual audio coding to reduce the transmission data rate. This paper explores the effect of perceptual audio coding on the classification performance using a DCASE 2020 challenge contribution [1]. We found that classification accuracy can degrade by up to 57% compared to classifying original (uncompressed) audio. We further demonstrate how lossy audio compression techniques during model training can improve classification accuracy of compressed audio signals even for audio codecs and codec bitrates not included in the training process.
abstract_zh: 之前的 DCASE 挑战赛有助于提高声学场景分类系统的性能。最先进的分类器需要强大的处理能力和内存，这对于资源有限的移动或物联网边缘设备来说是一个挑战。因此，更有可能将这些模型部署在更强大的硬件上，并对先前从低功耗边缘设备上传（或流式传输）的音频录音进行分类。在这种情况下，边缘设备可以应用感知音频编码来降低传输数据速率。本文利用 DCASE 2020 挑战赛的贡献 [1] 探讨了感知音频编码对分类性能的影响。我们发现，与对原始（未压缩）音频进行分类相比，分类准确度最多可降低 57%。我们进一步演示了模型训练期间的有损音频压缩技术如何提高压缩音频信号的分类准确性，即使对于训练过程中未包含的音频编解码器和编解码器比特率也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了感知音频编码对声学场景分类性能的影响，并探讨了通过训练过程中的有损压缩技术来缓解这一影响的方法。
AI.motivation: 当前先进分类模型对资源需求高，难以直接部署在边缘设备上，而边缘设备常通过音频压缩传输数据，导致分类性能下降问题亟待解决。
AI.method: 基于DCASE 2020挑战数据集，测试多种音频编码格式和比特率对分类的影响，并通过在训练阶段引入有损压缩技术验证其补偿效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，压缩音频分类准确率最高下降57%，但使用训练阶段的有损压缩技术可提升压缩音频分类准确率，即使针对未参与训练的编码格式也有效。
AI.conclusion: 音频编码伪影会显著影响分类性能，但通过训练阶段的有损压缩预处理可有效缓解这一问题，为边缘设备与云端协同部署提供参考。

authors_text: Gang Li,Xiang Li,Yujie Wang,Shanshan Zhang,Yichao Wu,Ding Liang
title: Knowledge Distillation for Object Detection via Rank Mimicking and Prediction-guided Feature Imitation
title_zh: 通过排名模仿和预测引导的特征模仿进行目标检测的知识蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge Distillation (KD) is a widely-used technology to inherit information from cumbersome teacher models to compact student models, consequently realizing model compression and acceleration. Compared with image classification, object detection is a more complex task, and designing specific KD methods for object detection is non-trivial. In this work, we elaborately study the behaviour difference between the teacher and student detection models, and obtain two intriguing observations: First, the teacher and student rank their detected candidate boxes quite differently, which results in their precision discrepancy. Second, there is a considerable gap between the feature response differences and prediction differences between teacher and student, indicating that equally imitating all the feature maps of the teacher is the sub-optimal choice for improving the student's accuracy. Based on the two observations, we propose Rank Mimicking (RM) and Prediction-guided Feature Imitation (PFI) for distilling one-stage detectors, respectively. RM takes the rank of candidate boxes from teachers as a new form of knowledge to distill, which consistently outperforms the traditional soft label distillation. PFI attempts to correlate feature differences with prediction differences, making feature imitation directly help to improve the student's accuracy. On MS COCO and PASCAL VOC benchmarks, extensive experiments are conducted on various detectors with different backbones to validate the effectiveness of our method. Specifically, RetinaNet with ResNet50 achieves 40.4% mAP in MS COCO, which is 3.5% higher than its baseline, and also outperforms previous KD methods.
summary: Knowledge Distillation (KD) is a widely-used technology to inherit information from cumbersome teacher models to compact student models, consequently realizing model compression and acceleration. Compared with image classification, object detection is a more complex task, and designing specific KD methods for object detection is non-trivial. In this work, we elaborately study the behaviour difference between the teacher and student detection models, and obtain two intriguing observations: First, the teacher and student rank their detected candidate boxes quite differently, which results in their precision discrepancy. Second, there is a considerable gap between the feature response differences and prediction differences between teacher and student, indicating that equally imitating all the feature maps of the teacher is the sub-optimal choice for improving the student's accuracy. Based on the two observations, we propose Rank Mimicking (RM) and Prediction-guided Feature Imitation (PFI) for distilling one-stage detectors, respectively. RM takes the rank of candidate boxes from teachers as a new form of knowledge to distill, which consistently outperforms the traditional soft label distillation. PFI attempts to correlate feature differences with prediction differences, making feature imitation directly help to improve the student's accuracy. On MS COCO and PASCAL VOC benchmarks, extensive experiments are conducted on various detectors with different backbones to validate the effectiveness of our method. Specifically, RetinaNet with ResNet50 achieves 40.4% mAP in MS COCO, which is 3.5% higher than its baseline, and also outperforms previous KD methods.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）是一种广泛使用的技术，它将信息从繁琐的教师模型继承到紧凑的学生模型，从而实现模型压缩和加速。与图像分类相比，目标检测是一项更复杂的任务，设计特定的 KD 方法用于目标检测并非易事。在这项工作中，我们详细研究了教师和学生检测模型之间的行为差​​异，并获得了两个有趣的观察结果：首先，教师和学生对检测到的候选框的排名差异很大，这导致了它们的精度差异。其次，教师和学生之间的特征响应差异和预测差异存在相当大的差距，这表明同等地模仿教师的所有特征图是提高学生准确性的次优选择。基于这两个观察结果，我们分别提出了排名模仿（RM）和预测引导特征模仿（PFI）来提炼一级检测器。 RM将教师的候选框排名作为一种新的知识形式进行蒸馏，其性能始终优于传统的软标签蒸馏。 PFI试图将特征差异与预测差异关联起来，使得特征模仿直接有助于提高学生的准确性。在 MS COCO 和 PASCAL VOC 基准上，在具有不同主干的各种检测器上进行了大量的实验，以验证我们方法的有效性。具体来说，ResNet50 的 RetinaNet 在 MS COCO 中实现了 40.4% 的 mAP，比其基线高出 3.5%，并且也优于之前的 KD 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对目标检测的模型压缩方法，通过模仿教师模型的候选框排序和预测引导的特征模仿，提升学生模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 与图像分类相比，目标检测任务更复杂，现有知识蒸馏方法在目标检测中效果有限，需设计特定的蒸馏策略以解决教师与学生模型间的排序差异和特征响应差异问题。
AI.method: 提出Rank Mimicking（RM）和Prediction-guided Feature Imitation（PFI）两种方法：RM通过模仿教师模型的候选框排序作为新知识，PFI通过关联特征差异与预测差异指导特征模仿。
AI.result: 在MS COCO和PASCAL VOC数据集上，基于ResNet50的RetinaNet模型达到40.4% mAP，较基线提升3.5%，优于现有知识蒸馏方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过关注排序差异和预测引导的特征模仿，本文方法有效解决了目标检测中的知识蒸馏难题，显著提升了学生模型的检测性能。

authors_text: Biying Fu,Naser Damer
title: Explainability of the Implications of Supervised and Unsupervised Face Image Quality Estimations Through Activation Map Variation Analyses in Face Recognition Models
title_zh: 通过人脸识别模型中的激活图变化分析来解释监督和无监督人脸图像质量估计的含义
comment: accepted at the IEEE Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision Workshops, WACV Workshops 2022
comments: accepted at the IEEE Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision Workshops, WACV Workshops 2022
abstract: It is challenging to derive explainability for unsupervised or statistical-based face image quality assessment (FIQA) methods. In this work, we propose a novel set of explainability tools to derive reasoning for different FIQA decisions and their face recognition (FR) performance implications. We avoid limiting the deployment of our tools to certain FIQA methods by basing our analyses on the behavior of FR models when processing samples with different FIQA decisions. This leads to explainability tools that can be applied for any FIQA method with any CNN-based FR solution using activation mapping to exhibit the network's activation derived from the face embedding. To avoid the low discrimination between the general spatial activation mapping of low and high-quality images in FR models, we build our explainability tools in a higher derivative space by analyzing the variation of the FR activation maps of image sets with different quality decisions. We demonstrate our tools and analyze the findings on four FIQA methods, by presenting inter and intra-FIQA method analyses. Our proposed tools and the analyses based on them point out, among other conclusions, that high-quality images typically cause consistent low activation on the areas outside of the central face region, while low-quality images, despite general low activation, have high variations of activation in such areas. Our explainability tools also extend to analyzing single images where we show that low-quality images tend to have an FR model spatial activation that strongly differs from what is expected from a high-quality image where this difference also tends to appear more in areas outside of the central face region and does correspond to issues like extreme poses and facial occlusions. The implementation of the proposed tools is accessible here [link].
summary: It is challenging to derive explainability for unsupervised or statistical-based face image quality assessment (FIQA) methods. In this work, we propose a novel set of explainability tools to derive reasoning for different FIQA decisions and their face recognition (FR) performance implications. We avoid limiting the deployment of our tools to certain FIQA methods by basing our analyses on the behavior of FR models when processing samples with different FIQA decisions. This leads to explainability tools that can be applied for any FIQA method with any CNN-based FR solution using activation mapping to exhibit the network's activation derived from the face embedding. To avoid the low discrimination between the general spatial activation mapping of low and high-quality images in FR models, we build our explainability tools in a higher derivative space by analyzing the variation of the FR activation maps of image sets with different quality decisions. We demonstrate our tools and analyze the findings on four FIQA methods, by presenting inter and intra-FIQA method analyses. Our proposed tools and the analyses based on them point out, among other conclusions, that high-quality images typically cause consistent low activation on the areas outside of the central face region, while low-quality images, despite general low activation, have high variations of activation in such areas. Our explainability tools also extend to analyzing single images where we show that low-quality images tend to have an FR model spatial activation that strongly differs from what is expected from a high-quality image where this difference also tends to appear more in areas outside of the central face region and does correspond to issues like extreme poses and facial occlusions. The implementation of the proposed tools is accessible here [link].
abstract_zh: 获得无监督或基于统计的人脸图像质量评估（FIQA）方法的可解释性具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一套新颖的可解释性工具，以得出不同 FIQA 决策的推理及其人脸识别 (FR) 性能影响。通过基于 FR 模型在处理具有不同 FIQA 决策的样本时的行为的分析，我们避免将我们的工具的部署限制在某些 FIQA 方法上。这导致可解释性工具可应用于任何 FIQA 方法以及任何基于 CNN 的 FR 解决方案，使用激活映射来展示从人脸嵌入导出的网络激活。为了避免 FR 模型中低质量图像和高质量图像的一般空间激活映射之间的低区分度，我们通过分析具有不同质量决策的图像集的 FR 激活图的变化，在更高的导数空间中构建我们的可解释性工具。我们通过展示 FIQA 方法间和内部分析来展示我们的工具并分析四种 FIQA 方法的结果。我们提出的工具和基于它们的分析指出，除其他结论外，高质量图像通常会导致中央面部区域之外的区域一致的低激活，而低质量图像尽管总体激活较低，但在这些区域中具有较高的激活变化。我们的可解释性工具还扩展到分析单个图像，我们发现低质量图像往往具有 FR 模型空间激活，这与高质量图像的预期有很大不同，这种差异也往往更多地出现在中央面部区域之外的区域，并且确实对应于极端姿势和面部遮挡等问题。所提议工具的实施可在此处访问[链接]。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的可解释性工具，用于分析监督和非监督面部图像质量评估（FIQA）方法在人脸识别（FR）模型中的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有的非监督或基于统计的FIQA方法难以解释其决策过程，因此需要开发一种通用的工具来解释不同FIQA方法的决策及其对FR性能的影响。
AI.method: 本文通过分析FR模型在处理不同质量图像时的激活图变化，构建了基于更高阶导数空间的可解释性工具，以展示网络激活的差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，高质量图像在非中央面部区域的激活较低且一致，而低质量图像在这些区域的激活变化较大。该工具还适用于单张图像的分析，发现低质量图像的激活模式与高质量图像存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的工具可以用于解释任何基于CNN的FR模型中的FIQA决策，并揭示了高质量与低质量图像在激活模式上的显著差异。

Our proposed tools and the analyses based on them point out, among other conclusions, that high-quality images typically cause consistent low activation on the areas outside of the central face region, while low-quality images, despite general low activation, have high variations of activation in such areas. Our explainability tools also extend to analyzing single images where we show that low-quality images tend to have an FR model spatial activation that strongly differs from what is expected from a high-quality image where this difference also tends to appear more in areas outside of the central face region and does correspond to issues like extreme poses and facial occlusions. The implementation of the proposed tools is accessible here [link]. 获得无监督或基于统计的人脸图像质量评估（FIQA）方法的可解释性具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一套新颖的可解释性工具，以得出不同 FIQA 决策的推理及其人脸识别 (FR) 性能影响。通过基于 FR 模型在处理具有不同 FIQA 决策的样本时的行为的分析，我们避免将我们的工具的部署限制在某些 FIQA 方法上。这导致可解释性工具可应用于任何 FIQA 方法以及任何基于 CNN 的 FR 解决方案，使用激活映射来展示从人脸嵌入导出的网络激活。为了避免 FR 模型中低质量图像和高质量图像的一般空间激活映射之间的低区分度，我们通过分析具有不同质量决策的图像集的 FR 激活图的变化，在更高的导数空间中构建我们的可解释性工具。我们通过展示 FIQA 方法间和内部分析来展示我们的工具并分析四种 FIQA 方法的结果。我们提出的工具和基于它们的分析指出，除其他结论外，高质量图像通常会导致中央面部区域之外的区域一致的低激活，而低质量图像尽管总体激活较低，但在这些区域中具有较高的激活变化。我们的可解释性工具还扩展到分析单个图像，我们发现低质量图像往往具有 FR 模型空间激活，这与高质量图像的预期有很大不同，这种差异也往往更多地出现在中央面部区域之外的区域，并且确实对应于极端姿势和面部遮挡等问题。所提议工具的实施可在此处访问[链接]。 本文提出了一种新的可解释性工具，用于分析监督和非监督面部图像质量评估（FIQA）方法在人脸识别（FR）模型中的影响。 Biying Fu,Naser Damer cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jung-Su Ha,Danny Driess,Marc Toussaint
title: Deep Visual Constraints: Neural Implicit Models for Manipulation Planning from Visual Input
title_zh: 深度视觉约束：根据视觉输入进行操作规划的神经隐式模型
abstract: Manipulation planning is the problem of finding a sequence of robot configurations that involves interactions with objects in the scene, e.g., grasping and placing an object, or more general tool-use. To achieve such interactions, traditional approaches require hand-engineering of object representations and interaction constraints, which easily becomes tedious when complex objects/interactions are considered. Inspired by recent advances in 3D modeling, e.g. NeRF, we propose a method to represent objects as continuous functions upon which constraint features are defined and jointly trained. In particular, the proposed pixel-aligned representation is directly inferred from images with known camera geometry and naturally acts as a perception component in the whole manipulation pipeline, thereby enabling long-horizon planning only from visual input. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/deep-visual-constraints
summary: Manipulation planning is the problem of finding a sequence of robot configurations that involves interactions with objects in the scene, e.g., grasping and placing an object, or more general tool-use. To achieve such interactions, traditional approaches require hand-engineering of object representations and interaction constraints, which easily becomes tedious when complex objects/interactions are considered. Inspired by recent advances in 3D modeling, e.g. NeRF, we propose a method to represent objects as continuous functions upon which constraint features are defined and jointly trained. In particular, the proposed pixel-aligned representation is directly inferred from images with known camera geometry and naturally acts as a perception component in the whole manipulation pipeline, thereby enabling long-horizon planning only from visual input. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/deep-visual-constraints
abstract_zh: 操纵规划是找到一系列机器人配置的问题，这些配置涉及与场景中的对象的交互，例如抓取和放置对象，或更一般的工具使用。为了实现这种交互，传统方法需要手工设计对象表示和交互约束，当考虑复杂的对象/交互时，这很容易变得乏味。受到 3D 建模最新进展的启发，例如NeRF，我们提出了一种将对象表示为连续函数的方法，在此基础上定义约束特征并联合训练。特别是，所提出的像素对齐表示是直接从具有已知相机几何形状的图像推断出来的，并且自然地充当整个操作管道中的感知组件，从而仅从视觉输入即可实现长视野规划。项目页面：https://sites.google.com/view/deep-visual-constraints

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经隐式模型和深度视觉约束的机械臂操控规划方法，通过视觉输入直接推断物体表示并实现长时程规划。
AI.motivation: 传统操控规划依赖手工设计的物体表示和交互约束，难以高效处理复杂物体和交互场景，需更自动化的方法实现视觉到规划的端到端流程。
AI.method: 利用神经隐式模型将物体表示为连续函数，结合像素对齐的视觉约束特征，通过已知相机几何的图像直接推断物体表示，并与规划模块联合训练。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在复杂场景下可实现仅依赖视觉输入的长时程操控规划，相比传统方法在效率和适应性上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度视觉约束与神经隐式模型的结合，本文为从视觉输入到机器人操控规划提供了新的端到端解决方案，推动了复杂交互任务的自动化发展。

authors_text: Alexander L. Mitchell,Wolfgang Merkt,Mathieu Geisert,Siddhant Gangapurwala,Martin Engelcke,Oiwi Parker Jones,Ioannis Havoutis,Ingmar Posner
title: Next Steps: Learning a Disentangled Gait Representation for Versatile Quadruped Locomotion
title_zh: 后续步骤：学习多功能四足动物运动的解缠结步态表示
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, accepted at IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2022
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures, accepted at IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2022
abstract: Quadruped locomotion is rapidly maturing to a degree where robots now routinely traverse a variety of unstructured terrains. However, while gaits can be varied typically by selecting from a range of pre-computed styles, current planners are unable to vary key gait parameters continuously while the robot is in motion. The synthesis, on-the-fly, of gaits with unexpected operational characteristics or even the blending of dynamic manoeuvres lies beyond the capabilities of the current state-of-the-art. In this work we address this limitation by learning a latent space capturing the key stance phases of a particular gait, via a generative model trained on a single trot style. This encourages disentanglement such that application of a drive signal to a single dimension of the latent state induces holistic plans synthesising a continuous variety of trot styles. In fact properties of this drive signal map directly to gait parameters such as cadence, footstep height and full stance duration. The use of a generative model facilitates the detection and mitigation of disturbances to provide a versatile and robust planning framework. We evaluate our approach on a real ANYmal quadruped robot and demonstrate that our method achieves a continuous blend of dynamic trot styles whilst being robust and reactive to external perturbations.
summary: Quadruped locomotion is rapidly maturing to a degree where robots now routinely traverse a variety of unstructured terrains. However, while gaits can be varied typically by selecting from a range of pre-computed styles, current planners are unable to vary key gait parameters continuously while the robot is in motion. The synthesis, on-the-fly, of gaits with unexpected operational characteristics or even the blending of dynamic manoeuvres lies beyond the capabilities of the current state-of-the-art. In this work we address this limitation by learning a latent space capturing the key stance phases of a particular gait, via a generative model trained on a single trot style. This encourages disentanglement such that application of a drive signal to a single dimension of the latent state induces holistic plans synthesising a continuous variety of trot styles. In fact properties of this drive signal map directly to gait parameters such as cadence, footstep height and full stance duration. The use of a generative model facilitates the detection and mitigation of disturbances to provide a versatile and robust planning framework. We evaluate our approach on a real ANYmal quadruped robot and demonstrate that our method achieves a continuous blend of dynamic trot styles whilst being robust and reactive to external perturbations.
abstract_zh: 四足运动正在迅速成熟，机器人现在可以例行穿越各种非结构化地形。然而，虽然通常可以通过从一系列预先计算的样式中进行选择来改变步态，但当前的规划者无法在机器人运动时连续改变关键步态参数。具有意想不到的操作特性的动态步态合成，甚至动态机动的混合超出了当前最先进技术的能力。在这项工作中，我们通过在单一小跑风格上训练的生成模型来学习捕捉特定步态的关键站立阶段的潜在空间来解决这一限制。这鼓励解开，使得将驱动信号应用于潜在状态的单一维度会引发综合了连续各种小跑风格的整体计划。事实上，该驱动信号的属性直接映射到步态参数，例如步频、脚步高度和全站立持续时间。生成模型的使用有助于检测和减轻干扰，从而提供通用且稳健的规划框架。我们在真实的 ANYmal 四足机器人上评估了我们的方法，并证明我们的方法实现了动态小跑风格的连续混合，同时对外部扰动具有鲁棒性和反应性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过学习分离的步态表示，使四足机器人能够实时连续调整步态参数，以实现更灵活的运动控制。
AI.motivation: 现有四足机器人步态规划方法无法在运动过程中连续调整关键步态参数，限制了其在复杂地形中的适应性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于生成模型学习特定步态（如 trot）的支撑阶段潜在空间，通过单维度驱动信号实现步态参数（如步频、步幅高度）的连续调整与动态融合。
AI.result: 在真实 ANYmal 四足机器人上验证了方法的有效性，展示了连续步态风格混合能力，并对环境扰动表现出鲁棒性与反应性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过潜在空间解耦实现步态参数的灵活控制，为四足机器人提供了通用且动态的运动规划框架。

authors_text: Domenico Cantone,Andrea De Domenico,Pietro Maugeri,Eugenio G. Omodeo
title: Complexity assessments for decidable fragments of Set Theory. IV: A quadratic reduction of constraints over nested sets to Boolean formulae
title_zh: 集合论可判定片段的复杂性评估。 IV：将嵌套集的约束二次减少为布尔公式
abstract: As a contribution to quantitative set-theoretic inferencing, a translation is proposed of conjunctions of literals of the forms $x=y\setminus z$, $x \neq y\setminus z$, and $z =\{x\}$, where $x,y,z$ stand for variables ranging over the von Neumann universe of sets, into unquantified Boolean formulae of a rather simple conjunctive normal form. The formulae in the target language involve variables ranging over a Boolean ring of sets, along with a difference operator and relators designating equality, non-disjointness and inclusion. Moreover, the result of each translation is a conjunction of literals of the forms $x=y\setminus z$, $x\neq y\setminus z$ and of implications whose antecedents are isolated literals and whose consequents are either inclusions (strict or non-strict) between variables, or equalities between variables. Besides reflecting a simple and natural semantics, which ensures satisfiability-preservation, the proposed translation has quadratic algorithmic time-complexity, and bridges two languages both of which are known to have an NP-complete satisfiability problem.
summary: As a contribution to quantitative set-theoretic inferencing, a translation is proposed of conjunctions of literals of the forms $x=y\setminus z$, $x \neq y\setminus z$, and $z =\{x\}$, where $x,y,z$ stand for variables ranging over the von Neumann universe of sets, into unquantified Boolean formulae of a rather simple conjunctive normal form. The formulae in the target language involve variables ranging over a Boolean ring of sets, along with a difference operator and relators designating equality, non-disjointness and inclusion. Moreover, the result of each translation is a conjunction of literals of the forms $x=y\setminus z$, $x\neq y\setminus z$ and of implications whose antecedents are isolated literals and whose consequents are either inclusions (strict or non-strict) between variables, or equalities between variables. Besides reflecting a simple and natural semantics, which ensures satisfiability-preservation, the proposed translation has quadratic algorithmic time-complexity, and bridges two languages both of which are known to have an NP-complete satisfiability problem.
abstract_zh: 作为对定量集合论推理的贡献，提出了将 $x=y\setminus z$、$x \neq y\setminus z$ 和 $z =\{x\}$ 形式的文字的合取（其中 $x,y,z$ 代表冯·诺依曼集合域范围内的变量）转换为相当简单的合取范式的未量化布尔公式。目标语言中的公式涉及范围在布尔集合环上的变量，以及指定相等、不相交和包含的差分运算符和关系器。此外，每个翻译的结果是 $x=y\setminus z$、$x\neq y\setminus z$ 形式的文字和含义的合取，其前件是孤立的文字，其结果是变量之间的包含（严格或非严格），或变量之间的相等。除了反映简单而自然的语义（确保可满足性保留）之外，所提出的翻译还具有二次算法时间复杂度，并桥接了两种已知都具有 NP 完全可满足性问题的语言。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将集合论中的特定约束条件转化为布尔公式的线性时间算法，用于解决可判定片段的复杂性评估问题。
AI.motivation: 为了提高集合论推理的效率，通过将嵌套集合约束转换为布尔公式，利用布尔逻辑的成熟解法处理集合论问题，同时保持可满足性。
AI.method: 设计一种二次时间复杂度的翻译方法，将涉及集合差集和成员关系的字面量约束转换为布尔环上的合取范式公式，并保留逻辑等价性。
AI.result: 成功实现将集合约束转化为布尔公式的二次时间算法，且两种语言的可满足性问题均保持NP完全性，为自动推理提供新途径。
AI.conclusion: 该翻译方法在保持逻辑语义的前提下实现高效转换，为集合论与布尔逻辑之间的桥梁构建提供了理论支持和算法基础。

authors_text: Junjie Sheng,Shengliang Cai,Haochuan Cui,Wenhao Li,Yun Hua,Bo Jin,Wenli Zhou,Yiqiu Hu,Lei Zhu,Qian Peng,Hongyuan Zha,Xiangfeng Wang
title: VMAgent: Scheduling Simulator for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: VMAgent：强化学习调度模拟器
abstract: A novel simulator called VMAgent is introduced to help RL researchers better explore new methods, especially for virtual machine scheduling. VMAgent is inspired by practical virtual machine (VM) scheduling tasks and provides an efficient simulation platform that can reflect the real situations of cloud computing. Three scenarios (fading, recovering, and expansion) are concluded from practical cloud computing and corresponds to many reinforcement learning challenges (high dimensional state and action spaces, high non-stationarity, and life-long demand). VMAgent provides flexible configurations for RL researchers to design their customized scheduling environments considering different problem features. From the VM scheduling perspective, VMAgent also helps to explore better learning-based scheduling solutions.
summary: A novel simulator called VMAgent is introduced to help RL researchers better explore new methods, especially for virtual machine scheduling. VMAgent is inspired by practical virtual machine (VM) scheduling tasks and provides an efficient simulation platform that can reflect the real situations of cloud computing. Three scenarios (fading, recovering, and expansion) are concluded from practical cloud computing and corresponds to many reinforcement learning challenges (high dimensional state and action spaces, high non-stationarity, and life-long demand). VMAgent provides flexible configurations for RL researchers to design their customized scheduling environments considering different problem features. From the VM scheduling perspective, VMAgent also helps to explore better learning-based scheduling solutions.
abstract_zh: 引入了一种名为 VMAgent 的新颖模拟器，以帮助 RL 研究人员更好地探索新方法，特别是虚拟机调度。 VMAgent受到实际虚拟机（VM）调度任务的启发，提供了一个能够反映云计算真实情况的高效仿真平台。从实际云计算中总结出三种场景（衰落、恢复和扩展），对应了许多强化学习挑战（高维状态和动作空间、高非平稳性和终身需求）。 VMAgent 为 RL 研究人员提供灵活的配置，以根据不同的问题特征设计定制的调度环境。从VM调度的角度来看，VMAgent也有助于探索更好的基于学习的调度解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VMAgent模拟器，用于强化学习中的虚拟机调度研究，提供高效仿真平台以应对云计算场景下的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在处理虚拟机调度的高维状态空间、非平稳性及长期需求时存在局限，需定制化仿真环境支持算法探索。
AI.method: 基于实际云计算场景设计VMAgent，包含衰减、恢复、扩展三种场景，提供灵活配置接口以适配不同调度问题特征。
AI.result: 验证了VMAgent在模拟高维状态空间、非平稳环境及长期需求场景下的有效性，支持定制化调度策略研究。
AI.conclusion: VMAgent为强化学习在虚拟机调度领域的应用提供了有效工具，推动了面向云计算场景的智能调度方法发展。

authors_text: Jiaqi Tang,Zhaoyang Liu,Chen Qian,Wayne Wu,Limin Wang
title: Progressive Attention on Multi-Level Dense Difference Maps for Generic Event Boundary Detection
title_zh: 用于通用事件边界检测的多级密集差异图的渐进关注
abstract: Generic event boundary detection is an important yet challenging task in video understanding, which aims at detecting the moments where humans naturally perceive event boundaries. The main challenge of this task is perceiving various temporal variations of diverse event boundaries. To this end, this paper presents an effective and end-to-end learnable framework (DDM-Net). To tackle the diversity and complicated semantics of event boundaries, we make three notable improvements. First, we construct a feature bank to store multi-level features of space and time, prepared for difference calculation at multiple scales. Second, to alleviate inadequate temporal modeling of previous methods, we present dense difference maps (DDM) to comprehensively characterize the motion pattern. Finally, we exploit progressive attention on multi-level DDM to jointly aggregate appearance and motion clues. As a result, DDM-Net respectively achieves a significant boost of 14% and 8% on Kinetics-GEBD and TAPOS benchmark, and outperforms the top-1 winner solution of LOVEU Challenge@CVPR 2021 without bells and whistles. The state-of-the-art result demonstrates the effectiveness of richer motion representation and more sophisticated aggregation, in handling the diversity of generic event boundary detection. The code is made available at \url{https://github.com/MCG-NJU/DDM}.
summary: Generic event boundary detection is an important yet challenging task in video understanding, which aims at detecting the moments where humans naturally perceive event boundaries. The main challenge of this task is perceiving various temporal variations of diverse event boundaries. To this end, this paper presents an effective and end-to-end learnable framework (DDM-Net). To tackle the diversity and complicated semantics of event boundaries, we make three notable improvements. First, we construct a feature bank to store multi-level features of space and time, prepared for difference calculation at multiple scales. Second, to alleviate inadequate temporal modeling of previous methods, we present dense difference maps (DDM) to comprehensively characterize the motion pattern. Finally, we exploit progressive attention on multi-level DDM to jointly aggregate appearance and motion clues. As a result, DDM-Net respectively achieves a significant boost of 14% and 8% on Kinetics-GEBD and TAPOS benchmark, and outperforms the top-1 winner solution of LOVEU Challenge@CVPR 2021 without bells and whistles. The state-of-the-art result demonstrates the effectiveness of richer motion representation and more sophisticated aggregation, in handling the diversity of generic event boundary detection. The code is made available at \url{https://github.com/MCG-NJU/DDM}.
abstract_zh: 通用事件边界检测是视频理解中一项重要但具有挑战性的任务，其目的是检测人类自然感知事件边界的时刻。这项任务的主要挑战是感知不同事件边界的各种时间变化。为此，本文提出了一种有效的端到端可学习框架（DDM-Net）。为了解决事件边界的多样性和复杂语义，我们做出了三项显着的改进。首先，我们构建一个特征库来存储空间和时间的多级特征，为多个尺度的差异计算做好准备。其次，为了缓解先前方法的时间建模不足的问题，我们提出了密集差异图（DDM）来全面表征运动模式。最后，我们利用多级 DDM 的渐进注意力来共同聚合外观和运动线索。结果，DDM-Net 在 Kinetics-GEBD 和 TAPOS 基准上分别实现了 14% 和 8% 的显着提升，并且超越了 LOVEU Challenge@CVPR 2021 的 top-1 获胜者解决方案。最先进的结果证明了更丰富的运动表示和更复杂的聚合在处理通用事件边界检测的多样性方面的有效性。该代码位于 \url{https://github.com/MCG-NJU/DDM}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DDM-Net的端到端框架，用于检测视频中人类自然感知的事件边界。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在时间建模和处理事件边界复杂语义方面存在不足，难以应对事件边界的多样性变化。
AI.method: 构建多级时空特征库计算差异；设计密集差异图（DDM）表征运动模式；采用渐进式注意力机制融合外观与运动信息。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-GEBD和TAPOS数据集上分别提升14%和8%，超越LOVEU挑战赛冠军方案。
AI.conclusion: 更丰富的运动表征和更精细的特征聚合策略能有效提升通用事件边界检测性能。

search_text: Progressive Attention on Multi-Level Dense Difference Maps for Generic Event Boundary Detection 用于通用事件边界检测的多级密集差异图的渐进关注 Generic event boundary detection is an important yet challenging task in video understanding, which aims at detecting the moments where humans naturally perceive event boundaries. The main challenge of this task is perceiving various temporal variations of diverse event boundaries. To this end, this paper presents an effective and end-to-end learnable framework (DDM-Net). To tackle the diversity and complicated semantics of event boundaries, we make three notable improvements. First, we construct a feature bank to store multi-level features of space and time, prepared for difference calculation at multiple scales. Second, to alleviate inadequate temporal modeling of previous methods, we present dense difference maps (DDM) to comprehensively characterize the motion pattern. Finally, we exploit progressive attention on multi-level DDM to jointly aggregate appearance and motion clues. As a result, DDM-Net respectively achieves a significant boost of 14% and 8% on Kinetics-GEBD and TAPOS benchmark, and outperforms the top-1 winner solution of LOVEU Challenge@CVPR 2021 without bells and whistles. The state-of-the-art result demonstrates the effectiveness of richer motion representation and more sophisticated aggregation, in handling the diversity of generic event boundary detection. The code is made available at \url{https://github.com/MCG-NJU/DDM}. 通用事件边界检测是视频理解中一项重要但具有挑战性的任务，其目的是检测人类自然感知事件边界的时刻。这项任务的主要挑战是感知不同事件边界的各种时间变化。为此，本文提出了一种有效的端到端可学习框架（DDM-Net）。为了解决事件边界的多样性和复杂语义，我们做出了三项显着的改进。首先，我们构建一个特征库来存储空间和时间的多级特征，为多个尺度的差异计算做好准备。其次，为了缓解先前方法的时间建模不足的问题，我们提出了密集差异图（DDM）来全面表征运动模式。最后，我们利用多级 DDM 的渐进注意力来共同聚合外观和运动线索。结果，DDM-Net 在 Kinetics-GEBD 和 TAPOS 基准上分别实现了 14% 和 8% 的显着提升，并且超越了 LOVEU Challenge@CVPR 2021 的 top-1 获胜者解决方案。最先进的结果证明了更丰富的运动表示和更复杂的聚合在处理通用事件边界检测的多样性方面的有效性。该代码位于 \url{https://github.com/MCG-NJU/DDM}。 本文提出一种名为DDM-Net的端到端框架，用于检测视频中人类自然感知的事件边界。 Jiaqi Tang,Zhaoyang Liu,Chen Qian,Wayne Wu,Limin Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Xavier Thomas,Dhruv Mahajan,Alex Pentland,Abhimanyu Dubey
title: Adaptive Methods for Aggregated Domain Generalization
title_zh: 聚合域泛化的自适应方法
abstract: Domain generalization involves learning a classifier from a heterogeneous collection of training sources such that it generalizes to data drawn from similar unknown target domains, with applications in large-scale learning and personalized inference. In many settings, privacy concerns prohibit obtaining domain labels for the training data samples, and instead only have an aggregated collection of training points. Existing approaches that utilize domain labels to create domain-invariant feature representations are inapplicable in this setting, requiring alternative approaches to learn generalizable classifiers. In this paper, we propose a domain-adaptive approach to this problem, which operates in two steps: (a) we cluster training data within a carefully chosen feature space to create pseudo-domains, and (b) using these pseudo-domains we learn a domain-adaptive classifier that makes predictions using information about both the input and the pseudo-domain it belongs to. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on a variety of domain generalization benchmarks without using domain labels whatsoever. Furthermore, we provide novel theoretical guarantees on domain generalization using cluster information. Our approach is amenable to ensemble-based methods and provides substantial gains even on large-scale benchmark datasets. The code can be found at: https://github.com/xavierohan/AdaClust_DomainBed
summary: Domain generalization involves learning a classifier from a heterogeneous collection of training sources such that it generalizes to data drawn from similar unknown target domains, with applications in large-scale learning and personalized inference. In many settings, privacy concerns prohibit obtaining domain labels for the training data samples, and instead only have an aggregated collection of training points. Existing approaches that utilize domain labels to create domain-invariant feature representations are inapplicable in this setting, requiring alternative approaches to learn generalizable classifiers. In this paper, we propose a domain-adaptive approach to this problem, which operates in two steps: (a) we cluster training data within a carefully chosen feature space to create pseudo-domains, and (b) using these pseudo-domains we learn a domain-adaptive classifier that makes predictions using information about both the input and the pseudo-domain it belongs to. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on a variety of domain generalization benchmarks without using domain labels whatsoever. Furthermore, we provide novel theoretical guarantees on domain generalization using cluster information. Our approach is amenable to ensemble-based methods and provides substantial gains even on large-scale benchmark datasets. The code can be found at: https://github.com/xavierohan/AdaClust_DomainBed
abstract_zh: 领域泛化涉及从训练源的异构集合中学习分类器，以便它泛化到从相似的未知目标域中提取的数据，并应用于大规模学习和个性化推理。在许多设置中，出于隐私考虑，禁止获取训练数据样本的域标签，而只能获取训练点的聚合集合。利用域标签创建域不变特征表示的现有方法在这种情况下不适用，需要替代方法来学习可泛化的分类器。在本文中，我们提出了解决此问题的域自适应方法，该方法分两个步骤进行：（a）我们在精心选择的特征空间内对训练数据进行聚类以创建伪域，（b）使用这些伪域，我们学习域自适应分类器，该分类器使用有关输入及其所属伪域的信息进行预测。我们的方法在各种领域泛化基准上实现了最先进的性能，而无需使用任何领域标签。此外，我们为使用集群信息的领域泛化提供了新颖的理论保证。我们的方法适用于基于集成的方法，即使在大规模基准数据集上也能提供可观的收益。代码可以在以下位置找到：https://github.com/xavierohan/AdaClust_DomainBed

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需领域标签的自适应方法，通过聚类生成伪领域并学习领域自适应分类器，解决聚合领域泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 隐私限制导致无法获取训练数据的领域标签，传统依赖领域标签的领域不变特征方法无法适用，需探索新方法实现泛化。
AI.method: 分两步：1）在选定特征空间聚类生成伪领域；2）基于伪领域学习同时利用输入和伪领域信息的自适应分类器。
AI.result: 在多个领域泛化基准中达到最先进性能，无需领域标签，提供理论保证，且适用于集成方法及大规模数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决无领域标签的领域泛化问题，结合聚类与自适应学习，兼具理论支持与实际应用优势。
