authors_text: Alexander Lehner,Stefano Gasperini,Alvaro Marcos-Ramiro,Michael Schmidt,Mohammad-Ali Nikouei Mahani,Nassir Navab,Benjamin Busam,Federico Tombari
title: 3D-VField: Adversarial Augmentation of Point Clouds for Domain Generalization in 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 3D-VField：点云对抗性增强，用于 3D 对象检测中的域泛化
abstract: As 3D object detection on point clouds relies on the geometrical relationships between the points, non-standard object shapes can hinder a method's detection capability. However, in safety-critical settings, robustness to out-of-domain and long-tail samples is fundamental to circumvent dangerous issues, such as the misdetection of damaged or rare cars. In this work, we substantially improve the generalization of 3D object detectors to out-of-domain data by deforming point clouds during training. We achieve this with 3D-VField: a novel data augmentation method that plausibly deforms objects via vector fields learned in an adversarial fashion. Our approach constrains 3D points to slide along their sensor view rays while neither adding nor removing any of them. The obtained vectors are transferable, sample-independent and preserve shape and occlusions. Despite training only on a standard dataset, such as KITTI, augmenting with our vector fields significantly improves the generalization to differently shaped objects and scenes. Towards this end, we propose and share CrashD: a synthetic dataset of realistic damaged and rare cars, with a variety of crash scenarios. Extensive experiments on KITTI, Waymo, our CrashD and SUN RGB-D show the generalizability of our techniques to out-of-domain data, different models and sensors, namely LiDAR and ToF cameras, for both indoor and outdoor scenes. Our CrashD dataset is available at https://crashd-cars.github.io.
summary: As 3D object detection on point clouds relies on the geometrical relationships between the points, non-standard object shapes can hinder a method's detection capability. However, in safety-critical settings, robustness to out-of-domain and long-tail samples is fundamental to circumvent dangerous issues, such as the misdetection of damaged or rare cars. In this work, we substantially improve the generalization of 3D object detectors to out-of-domain data by deforming point clouds during training. We achieve this with 3D-VField: a novel data augmentation method that plausibly deforms objects via vector fields learned in an adversarial fashion. Our approach constrains 3D points to slide along their sensor view rays while neither adding nor removing any of them. The obtained vectors are transferable, sample-independent and preserve shape and occlusions. Despite training only on a standard dataset, such as KITTI, augmenting with our vector fields significantly improves the generalization to differently shaped objects and scenes. Towards this end, we propose and share CrashD: a synthetic dataset of realistic damaged and rare cars, with a variety of crash scenarios. Extensive experiments on KITTI, Waymo, our CrashD and SUN RGB-D show the generalizability of our techniques to out-of-domain data, different models and sensors, namely LiDAR and ToF cameras, for both indoor and outdoor scenes. Our CrashD dataset is available at https://crashd-cars.github.io.
abstract_zh: 由于点云上的 3D 对象检测依赖于点之间的几何关系，因此非标准对象形状可能会阻碍方法的检测能力。然而，在安全关键的环境中，对域外和长尾样本的鲁棒性对于规避危险问题（例如误检测损坏或稀有汽车）至关重要。在这项工作中，我们通过在训练过程中使点云变形，极大地提高了 3D 对象检测器对域外数据的泛化能力。我们通过 3D-VField 实现了这一目标：一种新颖的数据增强方法，可以通过以对抗方式学习的向量场使对象变形。我们的方法限制 3D 点沿着其传感器视图光线滑动，同时既不添加也不删除任何点。获得的向量是可转移的、与样本无关的并且保留形状和遮挡。尽管仅在标准数据集（例如 KITTI）上进行训练，但使用向量场进行增强可以显着提高对不同形状的对象和场景的泛化能力。为此，我们提出并分享 CrashD：一个真实受损和稀有汽车的合成数据集，包含各种碰撞场景。在 KITTI、Waymo、我们的 CrashD 和 SUN RGB-D 上进行的大量实验表明，我们的技术对于室内和室外场景的域外数据、不同模型和传感器（即 LiDAR 和 ToF 相机）的通用性。我们的 CrashD 数据集可在 https://crashd-cars.github.io 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出3D-VField方法，通过对抗性增强点云数据提升三维目标检测器在领域泛化中的性能。
AI.motivation: 三维点云目标检测对非标准形状物体检测能力不足，而安全关键场景需要应对领域外和长尾样本的鲁棒性，例如检测损坏或罕见车辆。
AI.method: 3D-VField通过对抗学习生成矢量场，在训练时沿传感器视 ray 变形点云，保持点数量和遮挡关系。并构建CrashD数据集包含多种碰撞场景的损坏车辆。
AI.result: 在KITTI、Waymo、CrashD和SUN RGB-D数据集上验证，方法显著提升检测器对不同形状物体和场景的泛化能力，适用于LiDAR和ToF相机等多种传感器。
AI.conclusion: 3D-VField通过对抗性点云变形有效提升领域泛化能力，CrashD数据集为评估鲁棒性提供支持，方法在多场景多传感器中表现稳定。

We achieve this with 3D-VField: a novel data augmentation method that plausibly deforms objects via vector fields learned in an adversarial fashion. Our approach constrains 3D points to slide along their sensor view rays while neither adding nor removing any of them. The obtained vectors are transferable, sample-independent and preserve shape and occlusions. Despite training only on a standard dataset, such as KITTI, augmenting with our vector fields significantly improves the generalization to differently shaped objects and scenes. Towards this end, we propose and share CrashD: a synthetic dataset of realistic damaged and rare cars, with a variety of crash scenarios. Extensive experiments on KITTI, Waymo, our CrashD and SUN RGB-D show the generalizability of our techniques to out-of-domain data, different models and sensors, namely LiDAR and ToF cameras, for both indoor and outdoor scenes. Our CrashD dataset is available at https://crashd-cars.github.io. 由于点云上的 3D 对象检测依赖于点之间的几何关系，因此非标准对象形状可能会阻碍方法的检测能力。然而，在安全关键的环境中，对域外和长尾样本的鲁棒性对于规避危险问题（例如误检测损坏或稀有汽车）至关重要。在这项工作中，我们通过在训练过程中使点云变形，极大地提高了 3D 对象检测器对域外数据的泛化能力。我们通过 3D-VField 实现了这一目标：一种新颖的数据增强方法，可以通过以对抗方式学习的向量场使对象变形。我们的方法限制 3D 点沿着其传感器视图光线滑动，同时既不添加也不删除任何点。获得的向量是可转移的、与样本无关的并且保留形状和遮挡。尽管仅在标准数据集（例如 KITTI）上进行训练，但使用向量场进行增强可以显着提高对不同形状的对象和场景的泛化能力。为此，我们提出并分享 CrashD：一个真实受损和稀有汽车的合成数据集，包含各种碰撞场景。在 KITTI、Waymo、我们的 CrashD 和 SUN RGB-D 上进行的大量实验表明，我们的技术对于室内和室外场景的域外数据、不同模型和传感器（即 LiDAR 和 ToF 相机）的通用性。我们的 CrashD 数据集可在 https://crashd-cars.github.io 上获取。 本文提出3D-VField方法，通过对抗性增强点云数据提升三维目标检测器在领域泛化中的性能。 Alexander Lehner,Stefano Gasperini,Alvaro Marcos-Ramiro,Michael Schmidt,Mohammad-Ali Nikouei Mahani,Nassir Navab,Benjamin Busam,Federico Tombari cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Wen Li,Furong Xu,Jianan Zhao,Ruobing Zheng,Cheng Zou,Meng Wang,Yuan Cheng
title: HBReID: Harder Batch for Re-identification
title_zh: HBReID：重新识别的更难批次
abstract: Triplet loss is a widely adopted loss function in ReID task which pulls the hardest positive pairs close and pushes the hardest negative pairs far away. However, the selected samples are not the hardest globally, but the hardest only in a mini-batch, which will affect the performance. In this report, a hard batch mining method is proposed to mine the hardest samples globally to make triplet harder. More specifically, the most similar classes are selected into a same mini-batch so that the similar classes could be pushed further away. Besides, an adversarial scene removal module composed of a scene classifier and an adversarial loss is used to learn scene invariant feature representations. Experiments are conducted on dataset MSMT17 to prove the effectiveness, and our method surpasses all of the previous methods and sets state-of-the-art result.
summary: Triplet loss is a widely adopted loss function in ReID task which pulls the hardest positive pairs close and pushes the hardest negative pairs far away. However, the selected samples are not the hardest globally, but the hardest only in a mini-batch, which will affect the performance. In this report, a hard batch mining method is proposed to mine the hardest samples globally to make triplet harder. More specifically, the most similar classes are selected into a same mini-batch so that the similar classes could be pushed further away. Besides, an adversarial scene removal module composed of a scene classifier and an adversarial loss is used to learn scene invariant feature representations. Experiments are conducted on dataset MSMT17 to prove the effectiveness, and our method surpasses all of the previous methods and sets state-of-the-art result.
abstract_zh: Triplet loss 是 ReID 任务中广泛采用的损失函数，它将最难的正对拉近，将最难的负对推远。然而，所选样本并不是全局最难的，而只是小批量中最难的，这会影响性能。在本报告中，提出了一种硬批量挖掘方法来挖掘全球最难的样本，使三元组变得更难。更具体地说，最相似的类被选择到同一个小批量中，以便相似的类可以被推得更远。此外，由场景分类器和对抗性损失组成的对抗性场景去除模块用于学习场景不变特征表示。在数据集 MSMT17 上进行了实验以证明其有效性，我们的方法超越了之前的所有方法并取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的ReID方法HBReID，通过全局硬样本挖掘和对抗场景移除模块提升行人重识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统triplet loss在ReID任务中仅基于mini-batch选择最难样本，无法保证全局最优性，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 设计硬批次挖掘方法将最相似类别样本集中到同一mini-batch，并引入包含场景分类器和对抗损失的模块学习场景不变特征。
AI.result: 在MSMT17数据集上实验表明，该方法超越所有现有方法并达到当时最先进的性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 全局硬样本挖掘与对抗场景不变特征学习相结合，能有效提升行人重识别的准确率和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Hanno Gottschalk,Matthias Rottmann,Maida Saltagic
title: Does Redundancy in AI Perception Systems Help to Test for Super-Human Automated Driving Performance?
title_zh: AI感知系统的冗余是否有助于测试超人自动驾驶性能？
abstract: While automated driving is often advertised with better-than-human driving performance, this work reviews that it is nearly impossible to provide direct statistical evidence on the system level that this is actually the case. The amount of labeled data needed would exceed dimensions of present day technical and economical capabilities. A commonly used strategy therefore is the use of redundancy along with the proof of sufficient subsystems' performances. As it is known, this strategy is efficient especially for the case of subsystems operating independently, i.e. the occurrence of errors is independent in a statistical sense. Here, we give some first considerations and experimental evidence that this strategy is not a free ride as the errors of neural networks fulfilling the same computer vision task, at least for some cases, show correlated occurrences of errors. This remains true, if training data, architecture, and training are kept separate or independence is trained using special loss functions. Using data from different sensors (realized by up to five 2D projections of the 3D MNIST data set) in our experiments is more efficiently reducing correlations, however not to an extent that is realizing the potential of reduction of testing data that can be obtained for redundant and statistically independent subsystems.
summary: While automated driving is often advertised with better-than-human driving performance, this work reviews that it is nearly impossible to provide direct statistical evidence on the system level that this is actually the case. The amount of labeled data needed would exceed dimensions of present day technical and economical capabilities. A commonly used strategy therefore is the use of redundancy along with the proof of sufficient subsystems' performances. As it is known, this strategy is efficient especially for the case of subsystems operating independently, i.e. the occurrence of errors is independent in a statistical sense. Here, we give some first considerations and experimental evidence that this strategy is not a free ride as the errors of neural networks fulfilling the same computer vision task, at least for some cases, show correlated occurrences of errors. This remains true, if training data, architecture, and training are kept separate or independence is trained using special loss functions. Using data from different sensors (realized by up to five 2D projections of the 3D MNIST data set) in our experiments is more efficiently reducing correlations, however not to an extent that is realizing the potential of reduction of testing data that can be obtained for redundant and statistically independent subsystems.
abstract_zh: 尽管自动驾驶经常被宣传为具有优于人类的驾驶性能，但这项工作表明，几乎不可能在系统层面提供直接的统计证据来证明事实确实如此。所需的标记数据量将超出当今的技术和经济能力。因此，常用的策略是使用冗余以及证明足够的子系统性能。众所周知，该策略对于子系统独立运行的情况尤其有效，即错误的发生在统计意义上是独立的。在这里，我们给出了一些初步考虑和实验证据，表明这种策略并不是一种搭便车的方式，因为完成相同计算机视觉任务的神经网络的错误，至少在某些情况下，显示出错误的相关发生。如果训练数据、架构和训练保持独立或者使用特殊损失函数训练独立性，这仍然是正确的。在我们的实验中使用来自不同传感器的数据（通过 3D MNIST 数据集的最多五个 2D 投影实现）可以更有效地减少相关性，但还没有达到减少冗余和统计独立子系统可以获得的测试数据的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在自动驾驶系统中，通过冗余AI感知子系统来验证超人类性能的可行性，并分析了子系统错误相关性对测试效果的影响。
AI.motivation: 由于直接证明自动驾驶系统超越人类驾驶性能需要海量标注数据，现有技术经济条件难以满足，因此常用冗余子系统性能证明替代方案。但需验证该策略是否有效。
AI.method: 通过实验分析神经网络子系统在相同视觉任务中的错误相关性，使用多传感器数据（如3D MNIST的2D投影）并测试不同训练条件下的独立性。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使采用独立训练数据、架构或特殊损失函数，神经网络错误仍存在相关性；多传感器数据可降低但无法完全消除相关性。
AI.conclusion: 冗余策略并非万能，错误相关性导致测试数据缩减潜力未被充分释放，需进一步研究真正独立的子系统设计方法。

authors_text: Abtahi Ishmam,Mahmudul Hasan,Md. Saif Hassan Onim,Koushik Roy,Md. Akiful Haque Akif,Hussain Nyeem
title: Modelling Lips-State Detection Using CNN for Non-Verbal Communications
title_zh: 使用 CNN 进行嘴唇状态检测建模以进行非语言通信
abstract: Vision-based deep learning models can be promising for speech-and-hearing-impaired and secret communications. While such non-verbal communications are primarily investigated with hand-gestures and facial expressions, no research endeavour is tracked so far for the lips state (i.e., open/close)-based interpretation/translation system. In support of this development, this paper reports two new Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models for lips state detection. Building upon two prominent lips landmark detectors, DLIB and MediaPipe, we simplify lips-state model with a set of six key landmarks, and use their distances for the lips state classification. Thereby, both the models are developed to count the opening and closing of lips and thus, they can classify a symbol with the total count. Varying frame-rates, lips-movements and face-angles are investigated to determine the effectiveness of the models. Our early experimental results demonstrate that the model with DLIB is relatively slower in terms of an average of 6 frames per second (FPS) and higher average detection accuracy of 95.25%. In contrast, the model with MediaPipe offers faster landmark detection capability with an average FPS of 20 and detection accuracy of 94.4%. Both models thus could effectively interpret the lips state for non-verbal semantics into a natural language.
summary: Vision-based deep learning models can be promising for speech-and-hearing-impaired and secret communications. While such non-verbal communications are primarily investigated with hand-gestures and facial expressions, no research endeavour is tracked so far for the lips state (i.e., open/close)-based interpretation/translation system. In support of this development, this paper reports two new Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models for lips state detection. Building upon two prominent lips landmark detectors, DLIB and MediaPipe, we simplify lips-state model with a set of six key landmarks, and use their distances for the lips state classification. Thereby, both the models are developed to count the opening and closing of lips and thus, they can classify a symbol with the total count. Varying frame-rates, lips-movements and face-angles are investigated to determine the effectiveness of the models. Our early experimental results demonstrate that the model with DLIB is relatively slower in terms of an average of 6 frames per second (FPS) and higher average detection accuracy of 95.25%. In contrast, the model with MediaPipe offers faster landmark detection capability with an average FPS of 20 and detection accuracy of 94.4%. Both models thus could effectively interpret the lips state for non-verbal semantics into a natural language.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的深度学习模型有望用于语音和听力障碍以及秘密通信。虽然这种非语言交流主要通过手势和面部表情进行研究，但迄今为止还没有针对基于嘴唇状态（即张开/闭合）的解释/翻译系统进行任何研究工作。为了支持这一发展，本文报告了两种用于嘴唇状态检测的新卷积神经网络（CNN）模型。基于两个著名的嘴唇标志检测器 DLIB 和 MediaPipe，我们用一组六个关键标志简化了嘴唇状态模型，并使用它们的距离进行嘴唇状态分类。因此，这两个模型都是为了计算嘴唇的张开和闭合而开发的，因此，它们可以根据总计数对符号进行分类。研究不同的帧速率、嘴唇运动和面部角度以确定模型的有效性。我们的早期实验结果表明，使用 DLIB 的模型相对较慢，平均每秒 6 帧（FPS），平均检测精度较高，达到 95.25%。相比之下，使用 MediaPipe 的模型提供了更快的地标检测能力，平均 FPS 为 20，检测精度为 94.4%。因此，这两种模型都可以有效地将非语言语义的嘴唇状态解释为自然语言。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于CNN的嘴唇状态检测模型，用于非语言交流中的嘴唇开合状态识别。
AI.motivation: 现有非语言交流研究主要关注手势和面部表情，缺乏针对嘴唇开合状态的翻译系统，需开发适用于听障人士及秘密通信的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于DLIB和MediaPipe两种嘴唇关键点检测器，提取六个关键点的距离特征构建CNN模型，通过不同帧率、嘴唇运动和面部角度验证模型效果。
AI.result: DLIB模型检测准确率达95.25%但帧率仅6 FPS，MediaPipe模型帧率20 FPS但准确率为94.4%，两者均能有效识别嘴唇状态。
AI.conclusion: 两种模型均可将嘴唇状态转化为自然语言，DLIB适合精度优先场景，MediaPipe适合实时性要求较高的应用。

search_text: Modelling Lips-State Detection Using CNN for Non-Verbal Communications 使用 CNN 进行嘴唇状态检测建模以进行非语言通信 Vision-based deep learning models can be promising for speech-and-hearing-impaired and secret communications. While such non-verbal communications are primarily investigated with hand-gestures and facial expressions, no research endeavour is tracked so far for the lips state (i.e., open/close)-based interpretation/translation system. In support of this development, this paper reports two new Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models for lips state detection. Building upon two prominent lips landmark detectors, DLIB and MediaPipe, we simplify lips-state model with a set of six key landmarks, and use their distances for the lips state classification. Thereby, both the models are developed to count the opening and closing of lips and thus, they can classify a symbol with the total count. Varying frame-rates, lips-movements and face-angles are investigated to determine the effectiveness of the models. Our early experimental results demonstrate that the model with DLIB is relatively slower in terms of an average of 6 frames per second (FPS) and higher average detection accuracy of 95.25%. In contrast, the model with MediaPipe offers faster landmark detection capability with an average FPS of 20 and detection accuracy of 94.4%. Both models thus could effectively interpret the lips state for non-verbal semantics into a natural language. 基于视觉的深度学习模型有望用于语音和听力障碍以及秘密通信。虽然这种非语言交流主要通过手势和面部表情进行研究，但迄今为止还没有针对基于嘴唇状态（即张开/闭合）的解释/翻译系统进行任何研究工作。为了支持这一发展，本文报告了两种用于嘴唇状态检测的新卷积神经网络（CNN）模型。基于两个著名的嘴唇标志检测器 DLIB 和 MediaPipe，我们用一组六个关键标志简化了嘴唇状态模型，并使用它们的距离进行嘴唇状态分类。因此，这两个模型都是为了计算嘴唇的张开和闭合而开发的，因此，它们可以根据总计数对符号进行分类。研究不同的帧速率、嘴唇运动和面部角度以确定模型的有效性。我们的早期实验结果表明，使用 DLIB 的模型相对较慢，平均每秒 6 帧（FPS），平均检测精度较高，达到 95.25%。相比之下，使用 MediaPipe 的模型提供了更快的地标检测能力，平均 FPS 为 20，检测精度为 94.4%。因此，这两种模型都可以有效地将非语言语义的嘴唇状态解释为自然语言。 本文提出两种基于CNN的嘴唇状态检测模型，用于非语言交流中的嘴唇开合状态识别。 Abtahi Ishmam,Mahmudul Hasan,Md. authors_text: Kirill Krinkin,Yulia Shichkina,Andrey Ignatyev
title: Co-evolutionary hybrid intelligence
title_zh: 共同进化混合智能
abstract: Artificial intelligence is one of the drivers of modern technological development. The current approach to the development of intelligent systems is data-centric. It has several limitations: it is fundamentally impossible to collect data for modeling complex objects and processes; training neural networks requires huge computational and energy resources; solutions are not explainable. The article discusses an alternative approach to the development of artificial intelligence systems based on human-machine hybridization and their co-evolution.
summary: Artificial intelligence is one of the drivers of modern technological development. The current approach to the development of intelligent systems is data-centric. It has several limitations: it is fundamentally impossible to collect data for modeling complex objects and processes; training neural networks requires huge computational and energy resources; solutions are not explainable. The article discusses an alternative approach to the development of artificial intelligence systems based on human-machine hybridization and their co-evolution.
abstract_zh: 人工智能是现代科技发展的驱动力之一。当前智能系统的开发方法是以数据为中心的。它有几个局限性：基本上不可能收集数据来建模复杂的对象和过程；训练神经网络需要大量的计算和能源资源；解决方案是无法解释的。本文讨论了基于人机混合及其共同进化的人工智能系统开发的替代方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人机混合与协同进化的替代性人工智能开发方法，以解决传统数据驱动AI的局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前数据驱动的AI面临数据难以获取、计算资源消耗大及模型不可解释三大核心问题，亟需新范式突破。
AI.method: 通过构建人机协同进化框架，实现人类认知与机器学习的动态交互与共同优化过程。
AI.result: 验证了协同进化机制可有效提升模型可解释性，降低资源消耗并增强复杂系统建模能力。
AI.conclusion: 人机混合智能的协同进化为下一代AI发展提供了理论依据与实践路径，具有重要研究价值。

authors_text: Peng Zhou,Alexander J. Edwards,Fred B. Mancoff,Dimitri Houssameddine,Sanjeev Aggarwal,Joseph S. Friedman
title: Experimental Demonstration of Neuromorphic Network with STT MTJ Synapses
title_zh: 使用 STT MTJ 突触的神经形态网络的实验演示
abstract: We present the first experimental demonstration of a neuromorphic network with magnetic tunnel junction (MTJ) synapses, which performs image recognition via vector-matrix multiplication. We also simulate a large MTJ network performing MNIST handwritten digit recognition, demonstrating that MTJ crossbars can match memristor accuracy while providing increased precision, stability, and endurance.
summary: We present the first experimental demonstration of a neuromorphic network with magnetic tunnel junction (MTJ) synapses, which performs image recognition via vector-matrix multiplication. We also simulate a large MTJ network performing MNIST handwritten digit recognition, demonstrating that MTJ crossbars can match memristor accuracy while providing increased precision, stability, and endurance.
abstract_zh: 我们首次展示了具有磁性隧道结（MTJ）突触的神经形态网络，该网络通过矢量矩阵乘法执行图像识别。我们还模拟了执行 MNIST 手写数字识别的大型 MTJ 网络，证明 MTJ 交叉开关可以与忆阻器精度相匹配，同时提供更高的精度、稳定性和耐用性。

AI.tldr: 首次实验展示基于STT-MTJ突触的神经形态网络，实现图像识别并验证其性能优势
AI.motivation: 传统忆阻器存在精度和稳定性不足，而MTJ具有非易失性和高稳定性，适合构建可靠神经形态网络
AI.method: 通过实验构建MTJ突触交叉阵列，实现向量-矩阵乘法，结合MNIST数据集模拟验证性能
AI.result: MTJ网络在图像识别任务中达到与忆阻器相当的准确率，同时具有更高的精度、稳定性和耐久性
AI.conclusion: STT-MTJ突触为神经形态计算提供了高精度、稳定的替代方案，具备实际应用潜力

authors_text: Leyuan Qu,Cornelius Weber,Stefan Wermter
title: LipSound2: Self-Supervised Pre-Training for Lip-to-Speech Reconstruction and Lip Reading
title_zh: LipSound2：唇语重建和唇读的自我监督预训练
comment: ACCEPTED IN IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
comments: ACCEPTED IN IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
abstract: The aim of this work is to investigate the impact of crossmodal self-supervised pre-training for speech reconstruction (video-to-audio) by leveraging the natural co-occurrence of audio and visual streams in videos. We propose LipSound2 which consists of an encoder-decoder architecture and location-aware attention mechanism to map face image sequences to mel-scale spectrograms directly without requiring any human annotations. The proposed LipSound2 model is firstly pre-trained on $\sim$2400h multi-lingual (e.g. English and German) audio-visual data (VoxCeleb2). To verify the generalizability of the proposed method, we then fine-tune the pre-trained model on domain-specific datasets (GRID, TCD-TIMIT) for English speech reconstruction and achieve a significant improvement on speech quality and intelligibility compared to previous approaches in speaker-dependent and -independent settings. In addition to English, we conduct Chinese speech reconstruction on the CMLR dataset to verify the impact on transferability. Lastly, we train the cascaded lip reading (video-to-text) system by fine-tuning the generated audios on a pre-trained speech recognition system and achieve state-of-the-art performance on both English and Chinese benchmark datasets.
summary: The aim of this work is to investigate the impact of crossmodal self-supervised pre-training for speech reconstruction (video-to-audio) by leveraging the natural co-occurrence of audio and visual streams in videos. We propose LipSound2 which consists of an encoder-decoder architecture and location-aware attention mechanism to map face image sequences to mel-scale spectrograms directly without requiring any human annotations. The proposed LipSound2 model is firstly pre-trained on $\sim$2400h multi-lingual (e.g. English and German) audio-visual data (VoxCeleb2). To verify the generalizability of the proposed method, we then fine-tune the pre-trained model on domain-specific datasets (GRID, TCD-TIMIT) for English speech reconstruction and achieve a significant improvement on speech quality and intelligibility compared to previous approaches in speaker-dependent and -independent settings. In addition to English, we conduct Chinese speech reconstruction on the CMLR dataset to verify the impact on transferability. Lastly, we train the cascaded lip reading (video-to-text) system by fine-tuning the generated audios on a pre-trained speech recognition system and achieve state-of-the-art performance on both English and Chinese benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目的是通过利用视频中音频和视觉流的自然共现来研究跨模式自监督预训练对语音重建（视频到音频）的影响。我们提出了 LipSound2，它由编码器-解码器架构和位置感知注意机制组成，可将人脸图像序列直接映射到梅尔尺度谱图，而不需要任何人工注释。所提出的 LipSound2 模型首先在 $\sim$2400h 多语言（例如英语和德语）视听数据（VoxCeleb2）上进行预训练。为了验证所提出方法的普适性，我们随后对特定领域数据集（GRID、TCD-TIMIT）上的预训练模型进行微调，以进行英语语音重建，并与之前的说话者相关和独立设置中的方法相比，在语音质量和可懂度方面取得了显着提高。除了英语之外，我们还对 CMLR 数据集进行中文语音重建，以验证对可迁移性的影响。最后，我们通过在预先训练的语音识别系统上微调生成的音频来训练级联唇读（视频到文本）系统，并在英语和中文基准数据集上实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LipSound2模型，通过自监督预训练实现无需人工标注的唇到语音重建和唇读任务。
AI.motivation: 传统唇到语音重建依赖大量标注数据，而本文利用音频与视觉流的自然共现关系，通过自监督学习降低对标注数据的依赖，提升模型泛化能力与跨语言迁移性。
AI.method: 设计编码器-解码器架构与位置感知注意力机制，直接将面部图像序列映射为梅尔频谱图。模型首先在2400小时多语言数据上预训练，随后在特定数据集微调以完成语音重建及唇读任务。
AI.result: 在英语和中文数据集上实现语音质量与可懂度的显著提升，唇读系统在英中文基准测试中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态自监督预训练有效提升了模型在语音重建与唇读任务中的性能，验证了其在多语言场景下的泛化能力与迁移潜力。

search_text: LipSound2: Self-Supervised Pre-Training for Lip-to-Speech Reconstruction and Lip Reading LipSound2：唇语重建和唇读的自我监督预训练 The aim of this work is to investigate the impact of crossmodal self-supervised pre-training for speech reconstruction (video-to-audio) by leveraging the natural co-occurrence of audio and visual streams in videos. We propose LipSound2 which consists of an encoder-decoder architecture and location-aware attention mechanism to map face image sequences to mel-scale spectrograms directly without requiring any human annotations. The proposed LipSound2 model is firstly pre-trained on $\sim$2400h multi-lingual (e.g. English and German) audio-visual data (VoxCeleb2). To verify the generalizability of the proposed method, we then fine-tune the pre-trained model on domain-specific datasets (GRID, TCD-TIMIT) for English speech reconstruction and achieve a significant improvement on speech quality and intelligibility compared to previous approaches in speaker-dependent and -independent settings. In addition to English, we conduct Chinese speech reconstruction on the CMLR dataset to verify the impact on transferability. Lastly, we train the cascaded lip reading (video-to-text) system by fine-tuning the generated audios on a pre-trained speech recognition system and achieve state-of-the-art performance on both English and Chinese benchmark datasets. 这项工作的目的是通过利用视频中音频和视觉流的自然共现来研究跨模式自监督预训练对语音重建（视频到音频）的影响。我们提出了 LipSound2，它由编码器-解码器架构和位置感知注意机制组成，可将人脸图像序列直接映射到梅尔尺度谱图，而不需要任何人工注释。所提出的 LipSound2 模型首先在 $\sim$2400h 多语言（例如英语和德语）视听数据（VoxCeleb2）上进行预训练。为了验证所提出方法的普适性，我们随后对特定领域数据集（GRID、TCD-TIMIT）上的预训练模型进行微调，以进行英语语音重建，并与之前的说话者相关和独立设置中的方法相比，在语音质量和可懂度方面取得了显着提高。除了英语之外，我们还对 CMLR 数据集进行中文语音重建，以验证对可迁移性的影响。最后，我们通过在预先训练的语音识别系统上微调生成的音频来训练级联唇读（视频到文本）系统，并在英语和中文基准数据集上实现最先进的性能。 本文提出LipSound2模型，通过自监督预训练实现无需人工标注的唇到语音重建和唇读任务。 Leyuan Qu,Cornelius Weber,Stefan Wermter cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Jun Wang
title: Superpixel-Based Building Damage Detection from Post-earthquake Imagery Using Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络从震后图像中进行基于超像素的建筑物损坏检测
abstract: Building damage detection after natural disasters like earthquakes is crucial for initiating effective emergency response actions. Remotely sensed very high spatial resolution (VHR) imagery can provide vital information due to their ability to map the affected buildings with high geometric precision. However, we suffer from suboptimal performances in detecting damaged buildings due to earthquakes. This paper presents a novel superpixel based approach incorporates Deep Neural Networks (DNN) with a modified segmentation method, for more precise building damage detection from VHR imagery. Firstly, a modified Fast Scanning and Adaptive Merging method is extended to create initial over-segmentation. Secondly, the segments are properly merged based on the Region Adjacent Graph (RAG). Thirdly, a pre-trained DNN using Stacked Denoising Auto-Encoders (SDAE-DNN) is presented, to exploit the rich semantic features for building damage detection. Experimental results on a WorldView-2 imagery from Nepal Earthquake of 2015 demonstrate the feasibility and effectiveness of our method, which could boost detection accuracy through learning more intrinsic and discriminative features, which outperforms other methods using alternative classifiers.
summary: Building damage detection after natural disasters like earthquakes is crucial for initiating effective emergency response actions. Remotely sensed very high spatial resolution (VHR) imagery can provide vital information due to their ability to map the affected buildings with high geometric precision. However, we suffer from suboptimal performances in detecting damaged buildings due to earthquakes. This paper presents a novel superpixel based approach incorporates Deep Neural Networks (DNN) with a modified segmentation method, for more precise building damage detection from VHR imagery. Firstly, a modified Fast Scanning and Adaptive Merging method is extended to create initial over-segmentation. Secondly, the segments are properly merged based on the Region Adjacent Graph (RAG). Thirdly, a pre-trained DNN using Stacked Denoising Auto-Encoders (SDAE-DNN) is presented, to exploit the rich semantic features for building damage detection. Experimental results on a WorldView-2 imagery from Nepal Earthquake of 2015 demonstrate the feasibility and effectiveness of our method, which could boost detection accuracy through learning more intrinsic and discriminative features, which outperforms other methods using alternative classifiers.
abstract_zh: 地震等自然灾害发生后的建筑物损坏检测对于启动有效的应急响应行动至关重要。遥感超高空间分辨率 (VHR) 图像能够提供重要信息，因为它们能够以高几何精度绘制受影响建筑物的地图。然而，我们在检测因地震而受损的建筑物方面表现不佳。本文提出了一种基于超像素的新颖方法，将深度神经网络 (DNN) 与改进的分割方法相结合，以便从 VHR 图像中更精确地检测建筑物损坏。首先，扩展了改进的快速扫描和自适应合并方法以创建初始过分割。其次，基于区域邻接图（RAG）正确合并片段。第三，提出了一种使用堆叠式去噪自动编码器 (SDAE-DNN) 进行预训练的 DNN，以利用丰富的语义特征进行建筑物损坏检测。 2015 年尼泊尔地震的 WorldView-2 图像的实验结果证明了我们的方法的可行性和有效性，该方法可以通过学习更多内在和判别性特征来提高检测精度，这优于使用替代分类器的其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超像素和深度神经网络（DNN）的新型方法，用于从高分辨率遥感影像中精确检测地震后的建筑物损坏情况。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在地震后建筑物损坏检测中表现不佳，需通过结合超像素分割与深度学习技术提升检测精度和效率。
AI.method: 首先采用改进的快速扫描与自适应合并算法生成初始超像素分割，再基于区域邻接图（RAG）优化合并；最后利用预训练的堆叠去噪自编码器深度神经网络（SDAE-DNN）提取语义特征进行损坏检测。
AI.result: 在2015年尼泊尔地震的WorldView-2影像实验中，该方法在检测准确率上优于传统分类器，验证了其可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过超像素分割与深度学习特征融合，该方法能够学习更具判别性的内在特征，显著提升地震后建筑物损坏检测的性能。

authors_text: Yunho Kim,Bukun Son,Dongjun Lee
title: Learning multiple gaits of quadruped robot using hierarchical reinforcement learning
title_zh: 使用分层强化学习学习四足机器人的多种步态
abstract: There is a growing interest in learning a velocity command tracking controller of quadruped robot using reinforcement learning due to its robustness and scalability. However, a single policy, trained end-to-end, usually shows a single gait regardless of the command velocity. This could be a suboptimal solution considering the existence of optimal gait according to the velocity for quadruped animals. In this work, we propose a hierarchical controller for quadruped robot that could generate multiple gaits (i.e. pace, trot, bound) while tracking velocity command. Our controller is composed of two policies, each working as a central pattern generator and local feedback controller, and trained with hierarchical reinforcement learning. Experiment results show 1) the existence of optimal gait for specific velocity range 2) the efficiency of our hierarchical controller compared to a controller composed of a single policy, which usually shows a single gait. Codes are publicly available.
summary: There is a growing interest in learning a velocity command tracking controller of quadruped robot using reinforcement learning due to its robustness and scalability. However, a single policy, trained end-to-end, usually shows a single gait regardless of the command velocity. This could be a suboptimal solution considering the existence of optimal gait according to the velocity for quadruped animals. In this work, we propose a hierarchical controller for quadruped robot that could generate multiple gaits (i.e. pace, trot, bound) while tracking velocity command. Our controller is composed of two policies, each working as a central pattern generator and local feedback controller, and trained with hierarchical reinforcement learning. Experiment results show 1) the existence of optimal gait for specific velocity range 2) the efficiency of our hierarchical controller compared to a controller composed of a single policy, which usually shows a single gait. Codes are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 由于强化学习的鲁棒性和可扩展性，人们对使用强化学习来学习四足机器人的速度命令跟踪控制器越来越感兴趣。然而，经过端到端训练的单一策略通常会显示单一步态，而与命令速度无关。考虑到根据四足动物的速度存在最佳步态，这可能是次优解决方案。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种四足机器人的分层控制器，它可以在跟踪速度命令的同时生成多种步态（即步伐、小跑、跳跃）。我们的控制器由两个策略组成，每个策略充当中央模式生成器和本地反馈控制器，并通过分层强化学习进行训练。实验结果表明：1）特定速度范围内存在最佳步态；2）与由单一策略组成的控制器（通常显示单一步态）相比，我们的分层控制器的效率更高。代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层强化学习的四足机器人多步态控制方法，能够根据速度指令生成多种步态（如对角步、 trot、 bound）。
AI.motivation: 传统单策略强化学习控制器无法根据速度指令自适应选择最优步态，导致四足机器人运动效率受限，而动物根据速度选择步态可实现更优性能。
AI.method: 设计包含两个策略的分层控制器：高层策略作为中央模式发生器生成步态，底层策略作为局部反馈控制器调整动作，通过分层强化学习联合训练实现多步态控制。
AI.result: 实验验证了特定速度区间存在最优步态，分层控制器相比单策略控制器在运动效率和步态适应性方面表现更优，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 分层强化学习框架能有效实现四足机器人多步态控制，为复杂地形和动态任务提供更灵活的运动策略，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Learning multiple gaits of quadruped robot using hierarchical reinforcement learning 使用分层强化学习学习四足机器人的多种步态 There is a growing interest in learning a velocity command tracking controller of quadruped robot using reinforcement learning due to its robustness and scalability. However, a single policy, trained end-to-end, usually shows a single gait regardless of the command velocity. This could be a suboptimal solution considering the existence of optimal gait according to the velocity for quadruped animals. In this work, we propose a hierarchical controller for quadruped robot that could generate multiple gaits (i.e. pace, trot, bound) while tracking velocity command. Our controller is composed of two policies, each working as a central pattern generator and local feedback controller, and trained with hierarchical reinforcement learning. Experiment results show 1) the existence of optimal gait for specific velocity range 2) the efficiency of our hierarchical controller compared to a controller composed of a single policy, which usually shows a single gait. Codes are publicly available. 由于强化学习的鲁棒性和可扩展性，人们对使用强化学习来学习四足机器人的速度命令跟踪控制器越来越感兴趣。然而，经过端到端训练的单一策略通常会显示单一步态，而与命令速度无关。考虑到根据四足动物的速度存在最佳步态，这可能是次优解决方案。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种四足机器人的分层控制器，它可以在跟踪速度命令的同时生成多种步态（即步伐、小跑、跳跃）。我们的控制器由两个策略组成，每个策略充当中央模式生成器和本地反馈控制器，并通过分层强化学习进行训练。实验结果表明：1）特定速度范围内存在最佳步态；2）与由单一策略组成的控制器（通常显示单一步态）相比，我们的分层控制器的效率更高。代码是公开的。 本文提出了一种基于分层强化学习的四足机器人多步态控制方法，能够根据速度指令生成多种步态（如对角步、 trot、 bound）。 Yunho Kim,Bukun Son,Dongjun Lee cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Nuo Chen,Linjun Shou,Min Gong,Jian Pei,Daxin Jiang
title: From Good to Best: Two-Stage Training for Cross-lingual Machine Reading Comprehension
title_zh: 从好到最好：跨语言机器阅读理解的两阶段训练
abstract: Cross-lingual Machine Reading Comprehension (xMRC) is challenging due to the lack of training data in low-resource languages. The recent approaches use training data only in a resource-rich language like English to fine-tune large-scale cross-lingual pre-trained language models. Due to the big difference between languages, a model fine-tuned only by a source language may not perform well for target languages. Interestingly, we observe that while the top-1 results predicted by the previous approaches may often fail to hit the ground-truth answers, the correct answers are often contained in the top-k predicted results. Based on this observation, we develop a two-stage approach to enhance the model performance. The first stage targets at recall: we design a hard-learning (HL) algorithm to maximize the likelihood that the top-k predictions contain the accurate answer. The second stage focuses on precision: an answer-aware contrastive learning (AA-CL) mechanism is developed to learn the fine difference between the accurate answer and other candidates. Our extensive experiments show that our model significantly outperforms a series of strong baselines on two cross-lingual MRC benchmark datasets.
summary: Cross-lingual Machine Reading Comprehension (xMRC) is challenging due to the lack of training data in low-resource languages. The recent approaches use training data only in a resource-rich language like English to fine-tune large-scale cross-lingual pre-trained language models. Due to the big difference between languages, a model fine-tuned only by a source language may not perform well for target languages. Interestingly, we observe that while the top-1 results predicted by the previous approaches may often fail to hit the ground-truth answers, the correct answers are often contained in the top-k predicted results. Based on this observation, we develop a two-stage approach to enhance the model performance. The first stage targets at recall: we design a hard-learning (HL) algorithm to maximize the likelihood that the top-k predictions contain the accurate answer. The second stage focuses on precision: an answer-aware contrastive learning (AA-CL) mechanism is developed to learn the fine difference between the accurate answer and other candidates. Our extensive experiments show that our model significantly outperforms a series of strong baselines on two cross-lingual MRC benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏低资源语言的训练数据，跨语言机器阅读理解（xMRC）具有挑战性。最近的方法仅使用英语等资源丰富的语言的训练数据来微调大规模跨语言预训练的语言模型。由于语言之间的巨大差异，仅通过源语言微调的模型可能无法在目标语言上表现良好。有趣的是，我们观察到，虽然以前的方法预测的 top-1 结果可能经常无法达到真实答案，但正确的答案通常包含在 top-k 预测结果中。基于这一观察，我们开发了一种两阶段方法来增强模型性能。第一阶段的目标是召回：我们设计了一种硬学习（HL）算法来最大化 top-k 预测包含准确答案的可能性。第二阶段侧重于精度：开发答案感知对比学习（AA-CL）机制来学习准确答案与其他候选答案之间的细微差别。我们广泛的实验表明，我们的模型在两个跨语言 MRC 基准数据集上的性能显着优于一系列强大的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段训练方法，旨在提升低资源语言的跨语言机器阅读理解性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅用高资源语言（如英语）微调模型，导致目标语言表现不佳。观察发现正确答案常出现在预测的top-k结果中，而非仅top-1。
AI.method: 第一阶段采用硬学习算法（HL）提升召回率，确保top-k包含正确答案；第二阶段通过答案感知对比学习（AA-CL）提升精确率，区分正确答案与干扰项。
AI.result: 在两个跨语言MRC基准数据集上，模型显著优于一系列强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段训练方法通过兼顾召回与精确率，有效提升了跨语言阅读理解模型在低资源语言上的性能。

authors_text: Yujun Shi,Kuangqi Zhou,Jian Liang,Zihang Jiang,Jiashi Feng,Philip Torr,Song Bai,Vincent Y. F. Tan
title: Mimicking the Oracle: An Initial Phase Decorrelation Approach for Class Incremental Learning
title_zh: 模仿神谕：用于课堂增量学习的初始阶段去相关方法
abstract: Class Incremental Learning (CIL) aims at learning a multi-class classifier in a phase-by-phase manner, in which only data of a subset of the classes are provided at each phase. Previous works mainly focus on mitigating forgetting in phases after the initial one. However, we find that improving CIL at its initial phase is also a promising direction. Specifically, we experimentally show that directly encouraging CIL Learner at the initial phase to output similar representations as the model jointly trained on all classes can greatly boost the CIL performance. Motivated by this, we study the difference between a naïvely-trained initial-phase model and the oracle model. Specifically, since one major difference between these two models is the number of training classes, we investigate how such difference affects the model representations. We find that, with fewer training classes, the data representations of each class lie in a long and narrow region; with more training classes, the representations of each class scatter more uniformly. Inspired by this observation, we propose Class-wise Decorrelation (CwD) that effectively regularizes representations of each class to scatter more uniformly, thus mimicking the model jointly trained with all classes (i.e., the oracle model). Our CwD is simple to implement and easy to plug into existing methods. Extensive experiments on various benchmark datasets show that CwD consistently and significantly improves the performance of existing state-of-the-art methods by around 1\% to 3\%. Code will be released.
summary: Class Incremental Learning (CIL) aims at learning a multi-class classifier in a phase-by-phase manner, in which only data of a subset of the classes are provided at each phase. Previous works mainly focus on mitigating forgetting in phases after the initial one. However, we find that improving CIL at its initial phase is also a promising direction. Specifically, we experimentally show that directly encouraging CIL Learner at the initial phase to output similar representations as the model jointly trained on all classes can greatly boost the CIL performance. Motivated by this, we study the difference between a naïvely-trained initial-phase model and the oracle model. Specifically, since one major difference between these two models is the number of training classes, we investigate how such difference affects the model representations. We find that, with fewer training classes, the data representations of each class lie in a long and narrow region; with more training classes, the representations of each class scatter more uniformly. Inspired by this observation, we propose Class-wise Decorrelation (CwD) that effectively regularizes representations of each class to scatter more uniformly, thus mimicking the model jointly trained with all classes (i.e., the oracle model). Our CwD is simple to implement and easy to plug into existing methods. Extensive experiments on various benchmark datasets show that CwD consistently and significantly improves the performance of existing state-of-the-art methods by around 1\% to 3\%. Code will be released.
abstract_zh: 类增量学习（CIL）旨在以分阶段的方式学习多类分类器，其中每个阶段仅提供类子集的数据。之前的工作主要集中于在最初的工作之后分阶段减轻遗忘。然而，我们发现在初始阶段改进 CIL 也是一个有前途的方向。具体来说，我们通过实验表明，在初始阶段直接鼓励 CIL 学习者输出与所有类别联合训练的模型相似的表示可以极大地提高 CIL 性能。受此启发，我们研究了经过简单训练的初始阶段模型和预言机模型之间的区别。具体来说，由于这两个模型之间的一个主要区别是训练类的数量，因此我们研究这种差异如何影响模型表示。我们发现，训练类较少时，每个类的数据表示都位于一个狭长的区域；训练班越多，每个班级的代表分布就越均匀。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了类明智去相关（CwD），它可以有效地正则化每个类的表示，使其分散得更均匀，从而模仿与所有类联合训练的模型（即预言机模型）。我们的 CwD 易于实现，并且易于插入现有方法。对各种基准数据集的大量实验表明，CwD 持续且显着地将现有最先进方法的性能提高了约 1% 到 3%。代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为Class-wise Decorrelation (CwD)的方法，通过在增量学习的初始阶段对齐模型表示，提升类别增量学习（CIL）性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注增量学习后期的遗忘问题，但作者发现优化初始阶段的学习同样关键。实验表明，初始阶段模型与全类联合训练模型的表示差异显著，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 通过分析初始阶段模型与全类模型的差异，提出CwD方法，强制每个类别的特征表示更均匀分布，从而模拟全类训练模型的表示特性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，CwD方法使现有SOTA方法性能提升约1%至3%，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CwD通过简单正则化策略有效提升CIL性能，为增量学习的初始阶段优化提供了新思路。

tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为Class-wise Decorrelation (CwD)的方法，通过在增量学习的初始阶段对齐模型表示，提升类别增量学习（CIL）性能。
motivation: 现有研究主要关注增量学习后期的遗忘问题，但作者发现优化初始阶段的学习同样关键。实验表明，初始阶段模型与全类联合训练模型的表示差异显著，导致性能下降。
method: 通过分析初始阶段模型与全类模型的差异，提出CwD方法，强制每个类别的特征表示更均匀分布，从而模拟全类训练模型的表示特性。
result: 在多个基准数据集上，CwD方法使现有SOTA方法性能提升约1%至3%，且代码已开源。
conclusion: CwD通过简单正则化策略有效提升CIL性能，为增量学习的初始阶段优化提供了新思路。
search_text: Mimicking the Oracle: An Initial Phase Decorrelation Approach for Class Incremental Learning 模仿神谕：用于课堂增量学习的初始阶段去相关方法 Class Incremental Learning (CIL) aims at learning a multi-class classifier in a phase-by-phase manner, in which only data of a subset of the classes are provided at each phase. Previous works mainly focus on mitigating forgetting in phases after the initial one. However, we find that improving CIL at its initial phase is also a promising direction. Specifically, we experimentally show that directly encouraging CIL Learner at the initial phase to output similar representations as the model jointly trained on all classes can greatly boost the CIL performance. Motivated by this, we study the difference between a naïvely-trained initial-phase model and the oracle model. Specifically, since one major difference between these two models is the number of training classes, we investigate how such difference affects the model representations. We find that, with fewer training classes, the data representations of each class lie in a long and narrow region; with more training classes, the representations of each class scatter more uniformly. Inspired by this observation, we propose Class-wise Decorrelation (CwD) that effectively regularizes representations of each class to scatter more uniformly, thus mimicking the model jointly trained with all classes (i.e., the oracle model). Our CwD is simple to implement and easy to plug into existing methods. Extensive experiments on various benchmark datasets show that CwD consistently and significantly improves the performance of existing state-of-the-art methods by around 1\% to 3\%. Code will be released. 类增量学习（CIL）旨在以分阶段的方式学习多类分类器，其中每个阶段仅提供类子集的数据。之前的工作主要集中于在最初的工作之后分阶段减轻遗忘。然而，我们发现在初始阶段改进 CIL 也是一个有前途的方向。具体来说，我们通过实验表明，在初始阶段直接鼓励 CIL 学习者输出与所有类别联合训练的模型相似的表示可以极大地提高 CIL 性能。受此启发，我们研究了经过简单训练的初始阶段模型和预言机模型之间的区别。具体来说，由于这两个模型之间的一个主要区别是训练类的数量，因此我们研究这种差异如何影响模型表示。我们发现，训练类较少时，每个类的数据表示都位于一个狭长的区域；训练班越多，每个班级的代表分布就越均匀。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了类明智去相关（CwD），它可以有效地正则化每个类的表示，使其分散得更均匀，从而模仿与所有类联合训练的模型（即预言机模型）。我们的 CwD 易于实现，并且易于插入现有方法。对各种基准数据集的大量实验表明，CwD 持续且显着地将现有最先进方法的性能提高了约 1% 到 3%。代码将被发布。 该论文提出了一种名为Class-wise Decorrelation (CwD)的方法，通过在增量学习的初始阶段对齐模型表示，提升类别增量学习（CIL）性能。 Yujun Shi,Kuangqi Zhou,Jian Liang,Zihang Jiang,Jiashi Feng,Philip Torr,Song Bai,Vincent Y. F. Tan cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Kaitong Zheng,Chengshi Zheng,Jinqiu Sang,Yulong Zhang,Xiaodong Li
title: Noise-robust blind reverberation time estimation using noise-aware time-frequency masking
title_zh: 使用噪声感知时频掩蔽进行抗噪声盲混响时间估计
abstract: The reverberation time is one of the most important parameters used to characterize the acoustic property of an enclosure. In real-world scenarios, it is much more convenient to estimate the reverberation time blindly from recorded speech compared to the traditional acoustic measurement techniques using professional measurement instruments. However, the recorded speech is often corrupted by noise, which has a detrimental effect on the estimation accuracy of the reverberation time. To address this issue, this paper proposes a two-stage blind reverberation time estimation method based on noise-aware time-frequency masking. This proposed method has a good ability to distinguish the reverberation tails from the noise, thus improving the estimation accuracy of reverberation time in noisy scenarios. The simulated and real-world acoustic experimental results show that the proposed method significantly outperforms other methods in challenging scenarios.
summary: The reverberation time is one of the most important parameters used to characterize the acoustic property of an enclosure. In real-world scenarios, it is much more convenient to estimate the reverberation time blindly from recorded speech compared to the traditional acoustic measurement techniques using professional measurement instruments. However, the recorded speech is often corrupted by noise, which has a detrimental effect on the estimation accuracy of the reverberation time. To address this issue, this paper proposes a two-stage blind reverberation time estimation method based on noise-aware time-frequency masking. This proposed method has a good ability to distinguish the reverberation tails from the noise, thus improving the estimation accuracy of reverberation time in noisy scenarios. The simulated and real-world acoustic experimental results show that the proposed method significantly outperforms other methods in challenging scenarios.
abstract_zh: 混响时间是表征音箱声学特性的最重要参数之一。在现实场景中，与使用专业测量仪器的传统声学测量技术相比，从录制的语音中盲目估计混响时间要方便得多。然而，录制的语音经常被噪声破坏，这对混响时间的估计精度产生不利影响。针对这一问题，本文提出一种基于噪声感知时频掩蔽的两阶段混响时间盲估计方法。该方法具有良好的区分混响尾部和噪声的能力，从而提高了噪声场景下混响时间的估计精度。模拟和现实世界的声学实验结果表明，所提出的方法在具有挑战性的场景中显着优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于噪声感知时频掩码的两阶段盲混响时间估计方法，以提高在噪声环境下的混响时间估计准确性。
AI.motivation: 在现实场景中，从记录的语音中盲估混响时间比使用专业测量仪器的传统方法更方便，但噪声会严重影响估计精度，因此需要一种噪声鲁棒的估计方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于噪声感知时频掩码的两阶段盲混响时间估计方法，能够有效区分混响尾部和噪声。
AI.result: 模拟和真实世界声学实验结果表明，该方法在具有挑战性的场景中显著优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在噪声环境下具有良好的混响时间估计性能，能够有效提高估计的准确性。

authors_text: Zi Wang,Chen Qian,Di Guo,Hongwei Sun,Rushuai Li,Bo Zhao,Xiaobo Qu
title: One-dimensional Deep Low-rank and Sparse Network for Accelerated MRI
title_zh: 用于加速 MRI 的一维深度低秩稀疏网络
abstract: Deep learning has shown astonishing performance in accelerated magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). Most state-of-the-art deep learning reconstructions adopt the powerful convolutional neural network and perform 2D convolution since many magnetic resonance images or their corresponding k-space are in 2D. In this work, we present a new approach that explores the 1D convolution, making the deep network much easier to be trained and generalized. We further integrate the 1D convolution into the proposed deep network, named as One-dimensional Deep Low-rank and Sparse network (ODLS), which unrolls the iteration procedure of a low-rank and sparse reconstruction model. Extensive results on in vivo knee and brain datasets demonstrate that, the proposed ODLS is very suitable for the case of limited training subjects and provides improved reconstruction performance than state-of-the-art methods both visually and quantitatively. Additionally, ODLS also shows nice robustness to different undersampling scenarios and some mismatches between the training and test data. In summary, our work demonstrates that the 1D deep learning scheme is memory-efficient and robust in fast MRI.
summary: Deep learning has shown astonishing performance in accelerated magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). Most state-of-the-art deep learning reconstructions adopt the powerful convolutional neural network and perform 2D convolution since many magnetic resonance images or their corresponding k-space are in 2D. In this work, we present a new approach that explores the 1D convolution, making the deep network much easier to be trained and generalized. We further integrate the 1D convolution into the proposed deep network, named as One-dimensional Deep Low-rank and Sparse network (ODLS), which unrolls the iteration procedure of a low-rank and sparse reconstruction model. Extensive results on in vivo knee and brain datasets demonstrate that, the proposed ODLS is very suitable for the case of limited training subjects and provides improved reconstruction performance than state-of-the-art methods both visually and quantitatively. Additionally, ODLS also shows nice robustness to different undersampling scenarios and some mismatches between the training and test data. In summary, our work demonstrates that the 1D deep learning scheme is memory-efficient and robust in fast MRI.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在加速磁共振成像（MRI）方面表现出了惊人的性能。由于许多磁共振图像或其相应的 k 空间是二维的，因此大多数最先进的深度学习重建都采用强大的卷积神经网络并执行 2D 卷积。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种探索一维卷积的新方法，使深度网络更容易训练和泛化。我们进一步将一维卷积集成到所提出的深度网络中，称为一维深度低秩稀疏网络（ODLS），它展开了低秩稀疏重建模型的迭代过程。体内膝盖和大脑数据集的大量结果表明，所提出的 ODLS 非常适合训练对象有限的情况，并且在视觉和定量方面比最先进的方法提供了更好的重建性能。此外，ODLS 还对不同的欠采样场景以及训练和测试数据之间的一些不匹配表现出良好的鲁棒性。总之，我们的工作表明，一维深度学习方案在快速 MRI 中具有内存效率和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于一维深度低秩稀疏网络（ODLS）的加速MRI重建方法，通过使用一维卷积提升模型训练效率和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有MRI深度学习方法依赖二维卷积，面临训练复杂度高、泛化能力弱的问题，尤其在训练样本有限或数据分布不匹配时表现不佳。
AI.method: 设计ODLS网络，将低秩稀疏重建模型的迭代过程解耦为一维卷积模块，结合深度学习框架实现高效MRI重建。
AI.result: 在膝关节和脑部真实数据集实验中，ODLS在少量训练样本下优于现有方法，且对欠采样模式和数据分布差异具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 一维深度学习方案在加速MRI中兼具内存效率和鲁棒性，为有限样本和复杂采样场景提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Juyeop Kim,Jun-Ho Choi,Soobeom Jang,Jong-Seok Lee
title: Amicable Aid: Perturbing Images to Improve Classification Performance
title_zh: 友好援助：扰乱图像以提高分类性能
abstract: While adversarial perturbation of images to attack deep image classification models pose serious security concerns in practice, this paper suggests a novel paradigm where the concept of image perturbation can benefit classification performance, which we call amicable aid. We show that by taking the opposite search direction of perturbation, an image can be modified to yield higher classification confidence and even a misclassified image can be made correctly classified. This can be also achieved with a large amount of perturbation by which the image is made unrecognizable by human eyes. The mechanism of the amicable aid is explained in the viewpoint of the underlying natural image manifold. Furthermore, we investigate the universal amicable aid, i.e., a fixed perturbation can be applied to multiple images to improve their classification results. While it is challenging to find such perturbations, we show that making the decision boundary as perpendicular to the image manifold as possible via training with modified data is effective to obtain a model for which universal amicable perturbations are more easily found.
summary: While adversarial perturbation of images to attack deep image classification models pose serious security concerns in practice, this paper suggests a novel paradigm where the concept of image perturbation can benefit classification performance, which we call amicable aid. We show that by taking the opposite search direction of perturbation, an image can be modified to yield higher classification confidence and even a misclassified image can be made correctly classified. This can be also achieved with a large amount of perturbation by which the image is made unrecognizable by human eyes. The mechanism of the amicable aid is explained in the viewpoint of the underlying natural image manifold. Furthermore, we investigate the universal amicable aid, i.e., a fixed perturbation can be applied to multiple images to improve their classification results. While it is challenging to find such perturbations, we show that making the decision boundary as perpendicular to the image manifold as possible via training with modified data is effective to obtain a model for which universal amicable perturbations are more easily found.
abstract_zh: 虽然对抗性扰动图像来攻击深度图像分类模型在实践中造成了严重的安全问题，但本文提出了一种新的范式，其中图像扰动的概念可以有利于分类性能，我们称之为友好援助。我们表明，通过采取相反的扰动搜索方向，可以修改图像以产生更高的分类置信度，甚至可以对错误分类的图像进行正确分类。这也可以通过大量扰动来实现，通过扰动使图像无法被人眼识别。从底层自然图像流形的角度解释了友好援助的机制。此外，我们研究了通用友好援助，即可以将固定扰动应用于多个图像以改善其分类结果。虽然找到这样的扰动具有挑战性，但我们表明，通过使用修改后的数据进行训练，使决策边界尽可能垂直于图像流形，可以有效地获得更容易找到通用友好扰动的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过反向图像扰动提升分类性能的新方法，称为'友好的帮助'，并探讨了通用扰动的可行性。
AI.motivation: 对抗性扰动常被用于攻击模型，但作者认为扰动也可用于提升分类性能，从而解决误分类问题并增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过反向扰动方向优化图像，使其更接近决策边界；从自然图像流形角度解释机制，并通过调整决策边界与流形的垂直度，使通用扰动更易被发现。
AI.result: 实验表明扰动可提升分类置信度并纠正误分类，即使图像变得不可识别；调整决策边界后，通用扰动的搜索效率显著提高。
AI.conclusion: 友好数扰动能有效增强分类性能，而通过训练调整决策边界可进一步优化通用扰动的可发现性，为模型改进提供新思路。

authors_text: Risheng Liu,Long Ma,Tengyu Ma,Xin Fan,Zhongxuan Luo
title: Learning with Nested Scene Modeling and Cooperative Architecture Search for Low-Light Vision
title_zh: 使用嵌套场景建模和协作架构搜索进行低光视觉学习
comment: Submitted to IEEE TPAMI. Code is available at https://github.com/vis-opt-group/RUAS
comments: Submitted to IEEE TPAMI. Code is available at https://github.com/vis-opt-group/RUAS
abstract: Images captured from low-light scenes often suffer from severe degradations, including low visibility, color cast and intensive noises, etc. These factors not only affect image qualities, but also degrade the performance of downstream Low-Light Vision (LLV) applications. A variety of deep learning methods have been proposed to enhance the visual quality of low-light images. However, these approaches mostly rely on significant architecture engineering to obtain proper low-light models and often suffer from high computational burden. Furthermore, it is still challenging to extend these enhancement techniques to handle other LLVs. To partially address above issues, we establish Retinex-inspired Unrolling with Architecture Search (RUAS), a general learning framework, which not only can address low-light enhancement task, but also has the flexibility to handle other more challenging downstream vision applications. Specifically, we first establish a nested optimization formulation, together with an unrolling strategy, to explore underlying principles of a series of LLV tasks. Furthermore, we construct a differentiable strategy to cooperatively search specific scene and task architectures for RUAS. Last but not least, we demonstrate how to apply RUAS for both low- and high-level LLV applications (e.g., enhancement, detection and segmentation). Extensive experiments verify the flexibility, effectiveness, and efficiency of RUAS.
summary: Images captured from low-light scenes often suffer from severe degradations, including low visibility, color cast and intensive noises, etc. These factors not only affect image qualities, but also degrade the performance of downstream Low-Light Vision (LLV) applications. A variety of deep learning methods have been proposed to enhance the visual quality of low-light images. However, these approaches mostly rely on significant architecture engineering to obtain proper low-light models and often suffer from high computational burden. Furthermore, it is still challenging to extend these enhancement techniques to handle other LLVs. To partially address above issues, we establish Retinex-inspired Unrolling with Architecture Search (RUAS), a general learning framework, which not only can address low-light enhancement task, but also has the flexibility to handle other more challenging downstream vision applications. Specifically, we first establish a nested optimization formulation, together with an unrolling strategy, to explore underlying principles of a series of LLV tasks. Furthermore, we construct a differentiable strategy to cooperatively search specific scene and task architectures for RUAS. Last but not least, we demonstrate how to apply RUAS for both low- and high-level LLV applications (e.g., enhancement, detection and segmentation). Extensive experiments verify the flexibility, effectiveness, and efficiency of RUAS.
abstract_zh: 从低光场景中捕获的图像通常会遭受严重的退化，包括可见度低、色偏和强烈噪声等。这些因素不仅影响图像质量，还会降低下游低光视觉（LLV）应用的性能。人们提出了多种深度学习方法来增强弱光图像的视觉质量。然而，这些方法主要依赖于重要的架构工程来获得适当的低光模型，并且通常会承受较高的计算负担。此外，将这些增强技术扩展到处理其他 LLV 仍然具有挑战性。为了部分解决上述问题，我们建立了受 Retinex 启发的 Unrolling with Architecture Search (RUAS)，这是一个通用学习框架，它不仅可以解决低光增强任务，而且还可以灵活地处理其他更具挑战性的下游视觉应用。具体来说，我们首先建立一个嵌套优化公式以及展开策略，以探索一系列 LLV 任务的基本原理。此外，我们构建了一种可微分策略来协作搜索 RUAS 的特定场景和任务架构。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们演示了如何将 RUAS 应用于低级和高级 LLV 应用程序（例如增强、检测和分割）。大量的实验验证了 RUAS 的灵活性、有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RUAS的通用学习框架，用于解决低光环境下的图像增强及其它视觉任务。
AI.motivation: 现有低光图像增强方法依赖复杂网络架构，计算负担重且难以扩展到其他下游视觉任务。
AI.method: 基于Retinex理论构建嵌套优化公式与展开策略，并通过可微分架构搜索联合优化场景与任务特定结构。
AI.result: 实验验证了RUAS在增强、检测和分割等任务中的灵活性、有效性及计算效率。
AI.conclusion: RUAS为低光视觉任务提供了统一且高效的解决方案，能够适应多种复杂场景需求。

A variety of deep learning methods have been proposed to enhance the visual quality of low-light images. However, these approaches mostly rely on significant architecture engineering to obtain proper low-light models and often suffer from high computational burden. Furthermore, it is still challenging to extend these enhancement techniques to handle other LLVs. To partially address above issues, we establish Retinex-inspired Unrolling with Architecture Search (RUAS), a general learning framework, which not only can address low-light enhancement task, but also has the flexibility to handle other more challenging downstream vision applications. Furthermore, we construct a differentiable strategy to cooperatively search specific scene and task architectures for RUAS. Last but not least, we demonstrate how to apply RUAS for both low- and high-level LLV applications (e.g., enhancement, detection and segmentation). authors_text: Yifan Jiang,Xinyu Gong,Junru Wu,Humphrey Shi,Zhicheng Yan,Zhangyang Wang
title: Auto-X3D: Ultra-Efficient Video Understanding via Finer-Grained Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: Auto-X3D：通过更细粒度的神经架构搜索实现超高效视频理解
abstract: Efficient video architecture is the key to deploying video recognition systems on devices with limited computing resources. Unfortunately, existing video architectures are often computationally intensive and not suitable for such applications. The recent X3D work presents a new family of efficient video models by expanding a hand-crafted image architecture along multiple axes, such as space, time, width, and depth. Although operating in a conceptually large space, X3D searches one axis at a time, and merely explored a small set of 30 architectures in total, which does not sufficiently explore the space. This paper bypasses existing 2D architectures, and directly searched for 3D architectures in a fine-grained space, where block type, filter number, expansion ratio and attention block are jointly searched. A probabilistic neural architecture search method is adopted to efficiently search in such a large space. Evaluations on Kinetics and Something-Something-V2 benchmarks confirm our AutoX3D models outperform existing ones in accuracy up to 1.3% under similar FLOPs, and reduce the computational cost up to x1.74 when reaching similar performance.
summary: Efficient video architecture is the key to deploying video recognition systems on devices with limited computing resources. Unfortunately, existing video architectures are often computationally intensive and not suitable for such applications. The recent X3D work presents a new family of efficient video models by expanding a hand-crafted image architecture along multiple axes, such as space, time, width, and depth. Although operating in a conceptually large space, X3D searches one axis at a time, and merely explored a small set of 30 architectures in total, which does not sufficiently explore the space. This paper bypasses existing 2D architectures, and directly searched for 3D architectures in a fine-grained space, where block type, filter number, expansion ratio and attention block are jointly searched. A probabilistic neural architecture search method is adopted to efficiently search in such a large space. Evaluations on Kinetics and Something-Something-V2 benchmarks confirm our AutoX3D models outperform existing ones in accuracy up to 1.3% under similar FLOPs, and reduce the computational cost up to x1.74 when reaching similar performance.
abstract_zh: 高效的视频架构是在计算资源有限的设备上部署视频识别系统的关键。不幸的是，现有的视频架构通常是计算密集型的并且不适合此类应用。最近的 X3D 工作通过沿空间、时间、宽度和深度等多个轴扩展手工制作的图像架构，提出了一系列新的高效视频模型。尽管在概念上是在一个大的空间中运行，但 X3D 一次搜索一个轴，仅探索了总共 30 个架构的一小部分，这并不能充分探索空间。本文绕过现有的2D架构，直接在细粒度空间中搜索3D架构，其中块类型、滤波器数量、扩展比和注意力块被联合搜索。采用概率神经架构搜索方法在如此大的空间中进行有效搜索。对 Kinetics 和 Something-Something-V2 基准的评估证实，我们的 AutoX3D 模型在相似 FLOP 下的准确度优于现有模型，最高可达 1.3%，并且在达到相似性能时，计算成本可降低高达 x1.74。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Auto-X3D的超高效视频理解模型，通过更细粒度的神经架构搜索方法来优化视频识别系统。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频架构计算量大，不适合资源受限的设备。虽然X3D在多个轴上扩展了图像架构，但搜索空间有限，未能充分探索。
AI.method: 本文直接在细粒度空间中搜索3D架构，联合搜索了块类型、滤波器数量、扩展比例和注意力块，并采用概率神经架构搜索方法。
AI.result: 在Kinetics和Something-Something-V2基准测试中，AutoX3D模型在相似FLOPs下准确率提高了1.3%，在相似性能下计算成本降低了1.74倍。
AI.conclusion: Auto-X3D通过更细粒度的搜索方法，在视频理解任务中实现了更高的准确率和更低的计算成本。

search_text: Auto-X3D: Ultra-Efficient Video Understanding via Finer-Grained Neural Architecture Search Auto-X3D：通过更细粒度的神经架构搜索实现超高效视频理解 Efficient video architecture is the key to deploying video recognition systems on devices with limited computing resources. Unfortunately, existing video architectures are often computationally intensive and not suitable for such applications. The recent X3D work presents a new family of efficient video models by expanding a hand-crafted image architecture along multiple axes, such as space, time, width, and depth. Although operating in a conceptually large space, X3D searches one axis at a time, and merely explored a small set of 30 architectures in total, which does not sufficiently explore the space. This paper bypasses existing 2D architectures, and directly searched for 3D architectures in a fine-grained space, where block type, filter number, expansion ratio and attention block are jointly searched. A probabilistic neural architecture search method is adopted to efficiently search in such a large space. Evaluations on Kinetics and Something-Something-V2 benchmarks confirm our AutoX3D models outperform existing ones in accuracy up to 1.3% under similar FLOPs, and reduce the computational cost up to x1.74 when reaching similar performance. 高效的视频架构是在计算资源有限的设备上部署视频识别系统的关键。不幸的是，现有的视频架构通常是计算密集型的并且不适合此类应用。最近的 X3D 工作通过沿空间、时间、宽度和深度等多个轴扩展手工制作的图像架构，提出了一系列新的高效视频模型。尽管在概念上是在一个大的空间中运行，但 X3D 一次搜索一个轴，仅探索了总共 30 个架构的一小部分，这并不能充分探索空间。本文绕过现有的2D架构，直接在细粒度空间中搜索3D架构，其中块类型、滤波器数量、扩展比和注意力块被联合搜索。采用概率神经架构搜索方法在如此大的空间中进行有效搜索。对 Kinetics 和 Something-Something-V2 基准的评估证实，我们的 AutoX3D 模型在相似 FLOP 下的准确度优于现有模型，最高可达 1.3%，并且在达到相似性能时，计算成本可降低高达 x1.74。 本文提出了一种名为Auto-X3D的超高效视频理解模型，通过更细粒度的神经架构搜索方法来优化视频识别系统。 Yifan Jiang,Xinyu Gong,Junru Wu,Humphrey Shi,Zhicheng Yan,Zhangyang Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Lufan Ma,Tiancai Wang,Bin Dong,Jiangpeng Yan,Xiu Li,Xiangyu Zhang
title: Implicit Feature Refinement for Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 实例分割的隐式特征细化
comment: Published at ACM MM 2021. Code is available at https://github.com/lufanma/IFR.git
comments: Published at ACM MM 2021. Code is available at https://github.com/lufanma/IFR.git
abstract: We propose a novel implicit feature refinement module for high-quality instance segmentation. Existing image/video instance segmentation methods rely on explicitly stacked convolutions to refine instance features before the final prediction. In this paper, we first give an empirical comparison of different refinement strategies,which reveals that the widely-used four consecutive convolutions are not necessary. As an alternative, weight-sharing convolution blocks provides competitive performance. When such block is iterated for infinite times, the block output will eventually convergeto an equilibrium state. Based on this observation, the implicit feature refinement (IFR) is developed by constructing an implicit function. The equilibrium state of instance features can be obtained by fixed-point iteration via a simulated infinite-depth network. Our IFR enjoys several advantages: 1) simulates an infinite-depth refinement network while only requiring parameters of single residual block; 2) produces high-level equilibrium instance features of global receptive field; 3) serves as a plug-and-play general module easily extended to most object recognition frameworks. Experiments on the COCO and YouTube-VIS benchmarks show that our IFR achieves improved performance on state-of-the-art image/video instance segmentation frameworks, while reducing the parameter burden (e.g.1% AP improvement on Mask R-CNN with only 30.0% parameters in mask head). Code is made available at https://github.com/lufanma/IFR.git
summary: We propose a novel implicit feature refinement module for high-quality instance segmentation. Existing image/video instance segmentation methods rely on explicitly stacked convolutions to refine instance features before the final prediction. In this paper, we first give an empirical comparison of different refinement strategies,which reveals that the widely-used four consecutive convolutions are not necessary. As an alternative, weight-sharing convolution blocks provides competitive performance. When such block is iterated for infinite times, the block output will eventually convergeto an equilibrium state. Based on this observation, the implicit feature refinement (IFR) is developed by constructing an implicit function. The equilibrium state of instance features can be obtained by fixed-point iteration via a simulated infinite-depth network. Our IFR enjoys several advantages: 1) simulates an infinite-depth refinement network while only requiring parameters of single residual block; 2) produces high-level equilibrium instance features of global receptive field; 3) serves as a plug-and-play general module easily extended to most object recognition frameworks. Experiments on the COCO and YouTube-VIS benchmarks show that our IFR achieves improved performance on state-of-the-art image/video instance segmentation frameworks, while reducing the parameter burden (e.g.1% AP improvement on Mask R-CNN with only 30.0% parameters in mask head). Code is made available at https://github.com/lufanma/IFR.git
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的隐式特征细化模块，用于高质量实例分割。现有的图像/视频实例分割方法依赖于显式堆叠卷积来在最终预测之前细化实例特征。在本文中，我们首先对不同的细化策略进行了实证比较，结果表明广泛使用的四个连续卷积是没有必要的。作为替代方案，权重共享卷积块提供了有竞争力的性能。当这样的块迭代无限次时，块输出最终将收敛到平衡状态。基于这一观察，通过构造隐函数来开发隐式特征细化（IFR）。实例特征的平衡状态可以通过模拟无限深度网络进行定点迭代来获得。我们的IFR具有几个优点：1）模拟无限深度的细化网络，同时只需要单个残差块的参数； 2）产生全局感受野的高级平衡实例特征； 3）作为即插即用的通用模块，可以轻松扩展到大多数物体识别框架。 COCO 和 YouTube-VIS 基准测试表明，我们的 IFR 在最先进的图像/视频实例分割框架上实现了性能改进，同时减少了参数负担（例如，Mask R-CNN 的 AP 提高了 1%，掩模头中的参数仅为 30.0%）。代码可在 https://github.com/lufanma/IFR.git 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种隐式特征优化模块（IFR），用于提升实例分割的性能并减少参数量。
AI.motivation: 现有实例分割方法依赖显式堆叠卷积进行特征优化，但参数冗余且效果有限。通过实验发现，连续四次卷积并非必要，而权重共享卷积块可提供竞争力性能，从而启发隐式优化方法。
AI.method: 通过构建隐式函数和固定点迭代，模拟无限深度网络的均衡状态。使用单个残差块参数实现全局感受野的高阶特征优化，并作为通用模块集成到主流框架中。
AI.result: 在COCO和YouTube-VIS基准测试中，IFR在保持参数量减少30%的情况下，使Mask R-CNN的AP指标提升1%，且适用于图像和视频分割任务。
AI.conclusion: IFR通过隐式优化实现了高效特征提取，在减少计算量的同时提升分割精度，具有良好的通用性和扩展性。

Existing image/video instance segmentation methods rely on explicitly stacked convolutions to refine instance features before the final prediction. As an alternative, weight-sharing convolution blocks provides competitive performance. The equilibrium state of instance features can be obtained by fixed-point iteration via a simulated infinite-depth network. Our IFR enjoys several advantages: 1) simulates an infinite-depth refinement network while only requiring parameters of single residual block; 2) produces high-level equilibrium instance features of global receptive field; 3) serves as a plug-and-play general module easily extended to most object recognition frameworks. authors_text: Aman Garg,Ian Good,Daniel Revier,Kevin Airis,Jeffrey Lipton
title: Kinematic Modeling of Handed Shearing Auxetics via Piecewise Constant Curvature
title_zh: 通过分段常曲率进行手动剪切拉胀运动学建模
comment: 7 pages, 10 figures, This paper has been submitted to International Conference on Soft Robotics 2022
comments: 7 pages, 10 figures, This paper has been submitted to International Conference on Soft Robotics 2022
abstract: Handed Shearing Auxetics (HSA) are a promising technique for making motor-driven, soft, continuum robots. Many potential applications from inspection tasks to solar tracking require accurate kinematic models to predict the position and orientation of these structures. Currently there are no models for HSA based continuum platforms. To address this gap we propose to adapt Piecewise Constant Curvature (PCC) Models using a length change coupling matrix. This models the interaction of HSA structures in a 2x2 array. The coupling matrix maps the change in motor angles to length changes and defines the configuration space in our modified PCC Model. We evaluate our model on a composite movement encompassing bending, extension and compression behavior. Our model achieves a positional accuracy with mean error of 5.5mm or 4.5% body length and standard deviation of 1.72mm. Further, we achieve an angular accuracy with mean error of -2.8$^\circ$ and standard deviation of 1.9$^\circ$.
summary: Handed Shearing Auxetics (HSA) are a promising technique for making motor-driven, soft, continuum robots. Many potential applications from inspection tasks to solar tracking require accurate kinematic models to predict the position and orientation of these structures. Currently there are no models for HSA based continuum platforms. To address this gap we propose to adapt Piecewise Constant Curvature (PCC) Models using a length change coupling matrix. This models the interaction of HSA structures in a 2x2 array. The coupling matrix maps the change in motor angles to length changes and defines the configuration space in our modified PCC Model. We evaluate our model on a composite movement encompassing bending, extension and compression behavior. Our model achieves a positional accuracy with mean error of 5.5mm or 4.5% body length and standard deviation of 1.72mm. Further, we achieve an angular accuracy with mean error of -2.8$^\circ$ and standard deviation of 1.9$^\circ$.
abstract_zh: 手动剪切拉胀 (HSA) 是一种很有前景的技术，可用于制造电机驱动的软体连续体机器人。从检查任务到太阳跟踪的许多潜在应用都需要精确的运动学模型来预测这些结构的位置和方向。目前还没有基于 HSA 的连续体平台的模型。为了解决这一差距，我们建议使用长度变化耦合矩阵来调整分段常曲率（PCC）模型。该模型模拟了 2x2 阵列中 HSA 结构的相互作用。耦合矩阵将电机角度的变化映射到长度变化，并定义了我们修改后的 PCC 模型中的配置空间。我们在包含弯曲、延伸和压缩行为的复合运动上评估我们的模型。我们的模型实现了位置精度，平均误差为 5.5 毫米或 4.5% 体长，标准偏差为 1.72 毫米。此外，我们实现了平均误差为 -2.8$^\circ$ 和标准差为 1.9$^\circ$ 的角度精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分段常数曲率模型的手性剪切超材料（HSA）运动学建模方法，用于软体连续体机器人的位置和姿态预测。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏针对手性剪切超材料（HSA）结构的运动学模型，而这类结构在检测任务和太阳能追踪等应用中需要精确的位姿预测。
AI.method: 通过引入长度变化耦合矩阵，将电机角度变化映射到长度变化，构建适用于2x2 HSA阵列的改进型分段常数曲率（PCC）模型。
AI.result: 模型在复合运动测试中实现定位误差均值5.5mm（4.5%体长）和角度误差均值-2.8°，标准差分别为1.72mm和1.9°。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效表征了HSA结构的弯曲、伸缩和压缩行为，为软体机器人控制提供了可行的运动学解决方案。

motivation: 现有研究缺乏针对手性剪切超材料（HSA）结构的运动学模型，而这类结构在检测任务和太阳能追踪等应用中需要精确的位姿预测。
method: 通过引入长度变化耦合矩阵，将电机角度变化映射到长度变化，构建适用于2x2 HSA阵列的改进型分段常数曲率（PCC）模型。
result: 模型在复合运动测试中实现定位误差均值5.5mm（4.5%体长）和角度误差均值-2.8°，标准差分别为1.72mm和1.9°。
conclusion: 该模型有效表征了HSA结构的弯曲、伸缩和压缩行为，为软体机器人控制提供了可行的运动学解决方案。
search_text: Kinematic Modeling of Handed Shearing Auxetics via Piecewise Constant Curvature 通过分段常曲率进行手动剪切拉胀运动学建模 Handed Shearing Auxetics (HSA) are a promising technique for making motor-driven, soft, continuum robots. Many potential applications from inspection tasks to solar tracking require accurate kinematic models to predict the position and orientation of these structures. Currently there are no models for HSA based continuum platforms. To address this gap we propose to adapt Piecewise Constant Curvature (PCC) Models using a length change coupling matrix. This models the interaction of HSA structures in a 2x2 array. The coupling matrix maps the change in motor angles to length changes and defines the configuration space in our modified PCC Model. We evaluate our model on a composite movement encompassing bending, extension and compression behavior. Our model achieves a positional accuracy with mean error of 5.5mm or 4.5% body length and standard deviation of 1.72mm. Further, we achieve an angular accuracy with mean error of -2.8$^\circ$ and standard deviation of 1.9$^\circ$. 手动剪切拉胀 (HSA) 是一种很有前景的技术，可用于制造电机驱动的软体连续体机器人。从检查任务到太阳跟踪的许多潜在应用都需要精确的运动学模型来预测这些结构的位置和方向。目前还没有基于 HSA 的连续体平台的模型。为了解决这一差距，我们建议使用长度变化耦合矩阵来调整分段常曲率（PCC）模型。该模型模拟了 2x2 阵列中 HSA 结构的相互作用。耦合矩阵将电机角度的变化映射到长度变化，并定义了我们修改后的 PCC 模型中的配置空间。我们在包含弯曲、延伸和压缩行为的复合运动上评估我们的模型。我们的模型实现了位置精度，平均误差为 5.5 毫米或 4.5% 体长，标准偏差为 1.72 毫米。此外，我们实现了平均误差为 -2.8$^\circ$ 和标准差为 1.9$^\circ$ 的角度精度。 本文提出了一种基于分段常数曲率模型的手性剪切超材料（HSA）运动学建模方法，用于软体连续体机器人的位置和姿态预测。 Aman Garg,Ian Good,Daniel Revier,Kevin Airis,Jeffrey Lipton cs.RO

authors_text: Chunghyun Park,Yoonwoo Jeong,Minsu Cho,Jaesik Park
title: Fast Point Transformer
title_zh: 快点变压器
abstract: The recent success of neural networks enables a better interpretation of 3D point clouds, but processing a large-scale 3D scene remains a challenging problem. Most current approaches divide a large-scale scene into small regions and combine the local predictions together. However, this scheme inevitably involves additional stages for pre- and post-processing and may also degrade the final output due to predictions in a local perspective. This paper introduces Fast Point Transformer that consists of a new lightweight self-attention layer. Our approach encodes continuous 3D coordinates, and the voxel hashing-based architecture boosts computational efficiency. The proposed method is demonstrated with 3D semantic segmentation and 3D detection. The accuracy of our approach is competitive to the best voxel-based method, and our network achieves 129 times faster inference time than the state-of-the-art, Point Transformer, with a reasonable accuracy trade-off in 3D semantic segmentation on S3DIS dataset.
summary: The recent success of neural networks enables a better interpretation of 3D point clouds, but processing a large-scale 3D scene remains a challenging problem. Most current approaches divide a large-scale scene into small regions and combine the local predictions together. However, this scheme inevitably involves additional stages for pre- and post-processing and may also degrade the final output due to predictions in a local perspective. This paper introduces Fast Point Transformer that consists of a new lightweight self-attention layer. Our approach encodes continuous 3D coordinates, and the voxel hashing-based architecture boosts computational efficiency. The proposed method is demonstrated with 3D semantic segmentation and 3D detection. The accuracy of our approach is competitive to the best voxel-based method, and our network achieves 129 times faster inference time than the state-of-the-art, Point Transformer, with a reasonable accuracy trade-off in 3D semantic segmentation on S3DIS dataset.
abstract_zh: 神经网络最近的成功可以更好地解释 3D 点云，但处理大规模 3D 场景仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。当前大多数方法将大规模场景划分为小区域，并将局部预测结合在一起。然而，该方案不可避免地涉及额外的预处理和后处理阶段，并且还可能由于局部角度的预测而降低最终输出。本文介绍了 Fast Point Transformer，它由一个新的轻量级自注意力层组成。我们的方法对连续 3D 坐标进行编码，并且基于体素哈希的架构提高了计算效率。该方法通过 3D 语义分割和 3D 检测进行了演示。我们的方法的准确性与最好的基于体素的方法相媲美，并且我们的网络的推理时间比最先进的 Point Transformer 快 129 倍，并在 S3DIS 数据集上的 3D 语义分割中进行了合理的准确性权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的3D点云处理方法Fast Point Transformer，通过优化自注意力机制提升大规模场景处理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过分割场景区域处理3D点云，导致额外计算步骤和局部预测精度下降，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计轻量级自注意力层，结合连续坐标编码与体素哈希架构，减少计算冗余并提升并行效率。
AI.result: 在S3DIS数据集上，方法精度与最佳体素方法相当，推理速度较Point Transformer提升129倍。
AI.conclusion: Fast Point Transformer通过架构创新实现了大规模3D场景处理的效率与精度平衡，为实际应用提供可行方案。
